- **PR-OL-A3 Рђћ `geode outer-bundle` viewer (Tier 1 closure).**
  OL-A1.5 (#1446) Ж░ђ `auto_trigger_history.jsonl` ВЮё ВІаЖию Вѓ░ВХюьЋўвЕ┤Вёю
  outer-loop Ж░ђ вДївЊювіћ 3 streams (`auto_trigger_history.jsonl` /
  `mutations.jsonl` / `baseline.json`) Ж░ђ вфевЉљ вДцЖ▓еВАївіћвЇ░, Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ ВЁІ
  ВцЉ Вќ┤віљ ьїїВЮ╝ВЮё grep ьЋ┤ВЋ╝ ьЋаВДђ вфевЦ┤віћ surface gap ВъћВА┤ Рђћ в│И PR Ж░ђ
  closure. **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ** `core/cli/outer_bundle.py` (~280 LOC) Рђћ Typer
  command `geode outer-bundle [--limit N] [--json]` Ж░ђ 3 source вЦ╝
  chronologically merge Рєњ Rich table (default) вўљвіћ JSONL (--json) ВХюваЦ.
  `BundleEvent` dataclass (`ts: float`, `source: str`, `detail: str`)
  + `load_bundle_events()` public loader + `_parse_iso_or_epoch` (float/
  ISO-8601 dual-format) + `_tail_jsonl` (graceful partial-line skip).
  Source discriminator 3-Ж░њ: `auto_trigger` / `mutation` / `baseline`
  (вДѕВДђвДЅВЮђ synthetic 1-row from current promoted baseline.json). вѕёвЮй
  ьїїВЮ╝ Рєњ empty bundle (raise ВЌєВЮї). **CLI вЊ▒вАЮ**: `core/cli/__init__.py`
  ВЮў `app.command(name="outer-bundle")` вАю entry point. **15 invariant
  test** (`tests/test_ol_a3_outer_bundle.py`) Рђћ BundleEvent round-trip
  + parse helpers x3 (float / ISO / garbage) + _tail_jsonl x3 (last-N /
  malformed skip / missing path) + load_bundle_events x5 (auto-trigger
  only / mutation row / baseline synthetic / 3-source chronological
  sort / all-missing empty) + CLI x3 (Typer registration / no-data
  callable / --json output). Quality gates clean (ruff + ruff format
  --check + mypy + 15/15 pytest). CLI smoke (`geode outer-bundle
  --help`) renders.

## [0.99.27] - 2026-05-22

> 51 PRs accumulated since v0.99.26. Headline arcs:
>
> - **Self-improving Outer Loop sprint 1** (8 PR, this session) Рђћ
>   deception closure (OL-C1/C2/C3) + auto-trigger (OL-A1/A1.5) +
>   drift-prevention pins (OL-G/C2') + CB-FLAKE flake cleanup.
> - **Hermes absorption Phase 1** Рђћ FTS5 + ьіИвдгЖиИвъе indexer (Hermes-1c)
>   + `session_search` LLM tool (Hermes-1d).
> - **M-sprint in-context wiring** Рђћ M1-M4.4.3 (skill / agent contract /
>   few-shot pool / DPO publisher trilogy / 4-slot reader trilogy).
> - **PAPERCLIP** Рђћ subscription billing pattern for self-improving
>   loop mutator (`claude-cli` / `openai-codex` subprocess dispatch).
> - **S3-S6 + T6** Рђћ 4ВХЋ baseline.json ratchet + heuristic indicators
>   JSON mutation surface.

### Added

- **PR-OL-C2' Рђћ Reflection node canonical-path pins (drift prevention).**
  Roadmap (2026-05-22) ВЮў OL-C2' Ж░ђ `core/agent/reflection.py` ВІаЖию вфевЊѕВЮё
  ВџћЖхгьќѕВю╝вѓў GAP audit Ж▓░Ж│╝ reflection node Ж░ђ **ВЮ┤в»И** `core/agent/loop/
  _reflection.py` (321 LOC, PR-3 C-2 cognitive-loop-uplift) ВЌљ ВА┤Въг + 3 Ж░юВЮў
  test file (`tests/test_reflection_node.py` / `test_reflection_cost_gate.py`
  / `test_s0b_reflection_reader.py`) Ж░ђ В╗цв▓ё. в│И PR Ж░ђ OL-G ьїеьё┤ В░еВџЕ Рђћ
  4 Ж░юВЮў drift-prevention invariant pin ВХћЖ░ђ. (1) canonical path Ж░ђ
  `core/agent/loop/_reflection.py` ВъёВЮё вф╗ в░ЋВЮї. (2) parallel duplicate Ж░ђ
  `core/agent/reflection.py` ВЌљ ВЃЮЖИ░ВДђ вф╗ьЋўЖ▓ї anti-presence assert (Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ
  stale roadmap в│┤Ж│а ВъгЖхгьўё ВІювЈёьЋўвЕ┤ RED). (3) load-bearing surface
  (`reflect_async` / `REFLECTION_TOOL_NAME = "record_reflection"` /
  `_REFLECTION_TOOL` schema ВЮў hypotheses/confidence/next_action_hint
  3 ьЋёвЊю) вЁИВХю Ж▓ђВдЮ. (4) `HookEvent.COGNITIVE_REFLECT` enum entry +
  value вДцВ╣ў. **ВѓгВЮ┤вЊю вЁИьіИ**: `core/agent/reflection_policy.py` (S0a-
  style policy reader for operator-local `reflection.json` overrides)
  віћ *в│ёЖ░ю вфевЊѕ* Рђћ Ж░ЎВЮђ вћћваЅьєавдгВЌљ Ж│хВА┤ ьЌѕВџЕ (ВЌГьЋа вХёвдг: policy reader
  vs reflection-node implementation). 4/4 pytest pass, ruff + ruff
  format --check clean.

- **PR-OL-G Рђћ Config drift invariant pins (G-B / G-D / G-E).**
  PR-1 G-B/G-D/G-E (2026-05-21) Ж░ђ 3Ж▒┤ВЮў config drift вЦ╝ вІФВЋўВДђвДї invariant
  test Ж░ђ ВЌєВќ┤ ьџїЖиђ ВюёьЌў ВА┤Въг Рђћ в│И PR Ж░ђ 5Ж░юВЮў pin test ВХћЖ░ђ.
  - **G-B**: `AutoresearchConfig.target_model` / `judge_model` ьЋёвЊю +
    `autoresearch/train.py` ВЮў `TARGET_MODEL` / `JUDGE_MODEL` fallback
    ВЃЂВѕў + `_get_autoresearch_config` вАювЇћ ВА┤Въг (2 test).
  - **G-D**: `settings.learning_extract_model` ВёцВаЋ ьЋёвЊю +
    `core/hooks/llm_extract_learning.py` Ж░ђ ьЋ┤вІ╣ ьЋёвЊю grep-ьЎЋВЮИ (1 test).
  - **G-E**: `Settings.model` ьЂ┤въўВіц-ЖИ░в│ИЖ░њ Рєћ `routing.toml [model.defaults]
    anthropic` вДцВ╣ў + claude-opus-4-7 family pin (2 test). G-E віћ *runtime*
    Ж░њ (`settings.model` Рђћ env var ВўЂьќЦ) вїђВІа *class-level default* вЦ╝
    в╣ёЖхљ Рђћ Вџ┤ВўЂВъљ env override віћ drift Ж░ђ ВЋёвІў.
  **GAP audit в░юЖ▓г**: roadmap ВЮў G-B/D/E в│И ВъЉВЌЁ ВъљВ▓┤віћ ВЮ┤в»И PR-1 ВЌљ
  ВЮўьЋ┤ ВЎёвБї ВЃЂьЃю. drift-prevention invariant вДї в│И PR Ж░ђ ВХћЖ░ђ. 5/5 pytest
  pass, ruff + ruff format --check + mypy clean.

- **PR-OL-A1.5 Рђћ auto-trigger telemetry events + JSONL audit log.**
  PR-OL-A1 (#1445) Ж░ђ cron-driven mutator firing ВЮё вЈёВъЁьЋўвЕ┤Вёю `state`
  Ж░њВЮё INFO log вАювДї ВХюваЦ Рђћ Petri/Inspect viewer Ж░ЎВЮђ вІцВџ┤ВіцьіИвд╝ВЮ┤
  ВёИВЁўВЮё ьєхЖ│ёвАю ЖиИвд┤ Вѕў ВЌєвіћ deception ВъћВА┤. в│И PR Ж░ђ вІФЖИ░. **HookEvent
  5ВбЁ ВХћЖ░ђ** (`core/hooks/system.py`) Рђћ `SELF_IMPROVING_AUTO_TRIGGER_{FIRED,
  LOCK_BUSY, INTERVAL_BLOCKED, RUNNER_ERROR, PARSE_ERROR}` вАю Ж░Ђ terminal
  state 1:1 вДцьЋЉ. `disabled` віћ ВЮўвЈёВаЂВю╝вАю enum в»ИьЈгьЋе (Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ вфЁВІюВаЂ
  off Рєњ вДц cron tick вДѕвІц вг┤ВЮўв»И event в░юВЃЮ в░ЕВДђ, wiring ВЮў startup log
  Ж░ђ SoT). вДцьЋЉ ьЁїВЮ┤вИћ `STATE_TO_HOOK_EVENT` вЁИВХю Рђћ runtime resolution
  ВЮђ `getattr(HookEvent, name)`. **JSONL audit log** ВІаЖию writer
  `append_history_entry(*, state, detail, ts, trigger_id, history_path)`
  Ж░ђ `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/auto_trigger_history.jsonl` ВЌљ append-
  only ьЋю ВцёвІ╣ `{ts, state, detail, trigger_id}`. `ensure_ascii=False` вАю
  ьЋюЖИђ detail (`Вё╣ВЁў=ьЋюЖИђ`) в│┤ВА┤. `mkdir + write_text` вІеВЮ╝ try (PR-OL-C2
  Codex MCP lesson). OSError ВІю `False` в░ўьЎў + WARNING log Рђћ telemetry
  ВІцьїеЖ░ђ state machine ВўЂьќЦ вф╗ Вцї. Path віћ ``~/.geode/`` ьЋўВюё Рђћ ваѕьЈг
  ВЎИвХђ, gitignore N/A (PR-G5b #1350 "git-tracked but isn't" ВѓгвАђ ьџїьћ╝).
  **`auto_trigger_mutator` вдгьїЕьєавДЂ** Рђћ вДц `return AutoTriggerStatus(...)`
  вЦ╝ `_finalize_status` helper вАю вІеВЮ╝ ВХюЖхгВаљ ьєхЖ│╝: hook emit + history
  append + status в░ўьЎў 3Ж░ђВДђ вХђВѕўьџеЖ│╝Ж░ђ drift ВЌєВЮ┤ Ж░ЎВЮђ вХёЖИ░ВЌљВёю fire.
  `hooks: Any = None` ЖИ░в│ИЖ░њ Рђћ REPL/CLI ВДЂВаЉ ьўИВХю graceful (telemetry
  sink ВЌєВќ┤вЈё ВъЉвЈЎ). `_BrokenHooks` ВІюв«гваѕВЮ┤ВЁў test вАю hook handler
  raise Ж░ђ state machine crash вф╗ ВІюьѓевІцвіћ invariant Ж▓ђВдЮ. **wiring**:
  `core/wiring/automation.py::build_automation` ВЮў `register_auto_trigger`
  ьўИВХюВЌљ `hooks=hooks` ВЮИВъљ ВХћЖ░ђ Рђћ daemon ВЮў HookSystem instance Ж░ђ
  callback closure вАю В║АВ│љвЈ╝ cron fire вДѕвІц ВъљвЈЎ emit. **17 invariant test**
  (`tests/test_ol_a15_telemetry.py`) Рђћ HookEvent enum x3 (5 variant value /
  STATE_TO_HOOK_EVENT 5-state coverage + disabled вХђВъг / getattr resolve)
  + append_history_entry x5 (1 row write / multi-append / parent dir ВЃЮВё▒
  / Unicode preserve / OSError graceful) + auto_trigger_mutator end-to-end
  x9 (fired/lock_busy/interval_blocked/runner_error/parse_error Ж░ЂЖ░Ђ hook+
  history в░юВЃЮ / disabled Ж░ђ hook+history вЉў вІц skip / hooks=None graceful /
  multi-call append-only / hook handler raise Ж▓Евдг). Quality gates clean
  (ruff + format-check + mypy + 43/43 pytest вѕёВаЂ OL-A1+A1.5).

- **PR-OL-A1 Рђћ self-improving loop mutator auto-trigger (cron + 4-backend grounded).**
  Pre-OL-A1 ВЮў `SelfImprovingLoopRunner` віћ *manual* в░юьЎћвДї ВДђВЏљ (operator
  Ж░ђ `geode self-improve mutate` ьўИВХю, ьў╣ВЮђ autoresearch sprint runner
  ВЋѕВЌљВёю sync invoke). OL-A1 Ж░ђ GEODE daemon scheduler ВюёВЌљ cron-Ж░ђвіЦьЋю
  auto-trigger вЦ╝ Вќ╣Вќ┤ operator вХђВъг ВЃЂьЃюВЌљВёювЈё wrapper-prompt / ВаЋВ▒Ё
  ВДёьЎћЖ░ђ Ж│ёВєЇвљўЖ▓ї ьЋе. **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ** `core/self_improving_loop/auto_trigger.py`
  Рђћ pure ВюаьІИ `auto_trigger_mutator(*, enabled, min_interval_minutes,
  runner_factory=None, lock_path=None, timestamp_path=None, now=None)`
  Ж░ђ 6 terminal state ВцЉ ьЋўвѓў (`fired` / `lock_busy` /
  `interval_blocked` / `runner_error` / `parse_error` / `disabled`) ВЮў
  `AutoTriggerStatus` dataclass в░ўьЎў. в░юьЎћ ВцЉ в░юВЃЮ Ж░ђвіЦьЋю вфевЊа ВўѕВЎИ
  (factory raise / runner __init__ raise / `run_once()` raise)віћ try/except
  вАю ВъАьўђ `runner_error` вўљвіћ `parse_error` state вАю ьЎўВЏљ Рђћ scheduler loop
  crash в░ЕВДђ (Codex MCP fix-up). **2-layer вЈЎВІюВё▒ Ж░ђвЊю**: (1) `fcntl.flock`
  LOCK_EX | LOCK_NB advisory lock (`~/.geode/self-improving-loop/auto_trigger.lock`)
  Рђћ вЉљ cron-fire ьў╣ВЮђ cron + manual `geode self-improve mutate` race В░евІе,
  kernel crash ВІю ВъљвЈЎ ьЋ┤Ваю. (2) `min_interval_minutes` ьЃђВъёВіцьЃгьћё Ж▓їВЮ┤ьіИ
  (`auto_trigger_last_run.txt`) Рђћ clock-skew / restart re-fire ьЮАВѕў. Ж▓їВЮ┤ьіИвіћ
  lock ьџЇвЊЮ *ВаёьЏё* вфевЉљ ьЈЅЖ░ђ (TOCTOU в░ЕВќ┤ Рђћ Codex MCP fix-up). **4-backend
  source вЮ╝Вџ░ьїЁ Ж▓ђВдЮ**: wrapper Ж░ђ ВъљВ▓┤ source vocabulary вЦ╝ Ж░ђВДђВДђ ВЋіЖ│а
  `SelfImprovingLoopRunner.run_once()` ВЌљ dispatch. Runner віћ PR-PAPERCLIP
  (#1433) ВЮў `[self_improving_loop.mutator].source` 4-enum (`auto` /
  `api_key` / `claude-cli` / `openai-codex`) ВЮё ВЮ┤в»И honour. Dispatch
  topology віћ *вЉљ Ж▓йвАю*: (a) `claude-cli` / `openai-codex` віћ
  `core/self_improving_loop/cli_subprocess.py` ВЮў subprocess вАю вЮ╝Вџ░ьїЁ
  (Claude Code Max / ChatGPT Plus subscription В▓ГЖхг Рђћ `_ADAPTER_MAP` Вџ░ьџї),
  (b) `auto` / `api_key` віћ `core/llm/adapters.py::_ADAPTER_MAP` ВЮў 3-provider
  (`anthropic` / `openai` / `glm`) + `openai-codex` Вќ┤вїЉьё░ Ж▓йВюа. В┤Ю 4 backend
  (Claude Code subscription / Codex CLI subscription / Anthropic PAYG / OpenAI
  PAYG) вфевЉљ ВХћЖ░ђ ВйћвЊю ВЌєВЮ┤ ВъЉвЈЎ.
  **ВІаЖию config** `[self_improving_loop.scheduler]` (`SchedulerConfig` in
  `core/config/self_improving_loop.py`) Рђћ `enabled: bool = False` (opt-in
  default), `cron: str = "0 */6 * * *"` (5-field cron, every 6 hours),
  `min_interval_minutes: Annotated[int, Field(ge=1, le=1440)] = 60`.
  Pydantic v2 `extra="forbid"` Рђћ ВўцьЃђ Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ в░юЖ▓г Ж░ђвіЦ. **Wiring** Рђћ
  `core/wiring/automation.py::build_automation` ВЮў scheduler_service.start
  ВДЂьЏёВЌљ `register_auto_trigger(trigger_manager, enabled, cron,
  min_interval_minutes)` ьўИВХю. Default `enabled=False` ВЮ┤вЕ┤ `TriggerConfig`
  вЊ▒вАЮ ВъљВ▓┤вЦ╝ Ж▒┤вёѕвюђ Рђћ ВдЅ Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ `config.toml` ВЌљ `enabled = true` вфЁВІю
  ВЋѕ ьЋўвЕ┤ *ВйћвЊю path Ж░ђ dormant*. `try/except` вАю wiring ВўцвЦўЖ░ђ startup
  block ьЋўВДђ ВЋіЖ▓ї Ж░ђвЊю. **26 invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_a1_auto_trigger.py`)
  Рђћ SchedulerConfig defaults x4 (off / 6-hour cron / 60-min interval +
  range validation + extra forbid + top-level config carries scheduler) +
  lock semantics x3 (acquire fd / contention rejection / parent dir
  creation) + timestamp x3 (missing Рєњ None / round-trip / unparseable Рєњ
  None) + min-interval x3 (no prior / recent blocks / old satisfies) +
  auto_trigger_mutator terminal states x9 (disabled / interval_blocked /
  lock_busy / fired / runner_error / parse_error / lock-released-after-
  raise / runner-factory-raises Рєњ runner_error / post-lock interval re-check
  blocks fresh timestamp) + lazy runner import x1 + register_auto_trigger
  wiring x3 (disabled skip / enabled registers SCHEDULED TriggerConfig /
  closure forwards into `auto_trigger_mutator`). Quality gates clean (ruff +
  mypy + 26/26 pytest + 403 adjacent scheduler/wiring/trigger/automation
  regression). **Telemetry deferred** (`HookEvent.SELF_IMPROVING_AUTO_TRIGGER_*`
  + outer-loop bundle viewer) Рђћ OL-A2/OL-A3 scope.

- **PR-OL-C3 Рђћ `memory_recall` MD writer (close M4.4.1 reader's write-side).**
  M4.4.1 (#1436) Ж░ђ `core/self_improving_loop/memory_recall.load_memory_entries`
  + `in_context_wiring.py:123` вАю reader вДї ВХюВІю Рєњ Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ ВДЂВаЉ `.md`
  ьїїВЮ╝ВЮё ВєљВю╝вАю В▒ёВџ░ВДђ ВЋівіћ ьЋю `memory_recall` in-context slot ВЮ┤ ВўЂЖхг
  empty list ВюёВЌљ ranking ВъЉвЈЎ (PR-OL-C2 ВЮў few-shot pool Ж│╝ вЈЎВЮ╝ьЋю
  reader-without-writer deception). **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ**
  `core/memory/recall_writer.py` Рђћ pure ВюаьІИ `write_recall_entry(*, name,
  description, body, type_label, recall_dir=None, overwrite=False)` Ж░ђ
  M4.4.1 frontmatter parser Ж░ђ ЖИ░вїђьЋўвіћ ВаЋьЎЋьЋю schema
  (`---\nname: Рђд\ndescription: Рђд\nmetadata:\n  type: Рђд\n---\n\n{body}\n`)
  вАю ьЋю ВцёвІ╣ `.md` вЦ╝ ВъЉВё▒. `_slugify_name` Вю╝вАю alnum+hyphen+underscore
  ьїїВЮ╝вфЁ в│┤ВъЦ, `_escape_frontmatter_value` вАю multi-line name/description/
  type_label вІеВЮ╝ вЮ╝ВЮИ Ж░ЋВаю (YAML-light parser ВЮў line-per-key ЖиюВЋй Рђћ
  type_label Ж╣їВДђ escape ьЋўвіћ Ж▒┤ Codex MCP fix-up ьЏё ВХћЖ░ђ, frontmatter
  injection в░ЕВДђ). `mkdir(parents=True,
  exist_ok=True)` + `write_text` вІеВЮ╝ try (Codex MCP PR-OL-C2 ВЮў mkdir-
  outside-try ВѓгвАђ ВаЂВџЕ). Idempotent Рђћ `overwrite=False` (default) Ж░ђ
  ЖИ░ВА┤ ВігвЪгЖиИ ьїїВЮ╝ в│┤ВА┤, `True` ВІю вїђВ▓┤. `resolve_recall_dir()` Ж░ђ
  `$GEODE_MEMORY_RECALL_DIR` Вџ┤ВўЂВъљ override > `~/.geode/memory/recall/`
  default Рђћ reader ВЎђ *Ж░ЎВЮђ* env var вЦ╝ honour ьЋ┤Вёю Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ dir ьЋю
  Ж││вДї Вў«ЖИ░вЕ┤ read+write вЉў вІц вћ░вЮ╝Вў┤. 4 canonical type ВЃЂВѕў
  (`RECALL_TYPE_{USER,FEEDBACK,PROJECT,REFERENCE}`) + `VALID_RECALL_TYPES`
  frozenset вЁИВХю Рђћ Claude Code ВЮў auto-memory schema ВЎђ parity. Non-
  canonical type вЈё ВъЉВё▒ ВъљВ▓┤віћ ьЌѕВџЕ (DEBUG log) Рєњ Вџ┤ВўЂВъљ вЈёвЕћВЮИ в│ё
  custom type вДЅВДђ ВЋіВЮї. **Auto-trigger вХђВъг (ВЮўвЈё)** Рђћ `SESSION_ENDED`
  hook ВЌљВёю ВъљвЈЎ в░юьЎћ / LLM-curator віћ OL-C3.2 follow-up Вю╝вАю deferred,
  Жи╝Ж▒░: (1) ADR вХђВъг (every session В▒ёьЃЮ? promoted-only? curator?),
  (2) cost ceiling в»ИьЋЕВЮў, (3) disk usage cap в»ИьЋЕВЮў. ьўёВъг entry-point
  ВЮђ Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ CLI/REPL slash вАю `write_recall_entry` ВДЂВаЉ ьўИВХю. **17
  invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_c3_recall_writer.py`) Рђћ resolve x2
  (env override / ЖИ░в│И path), slugify x3 (canonical / Ж│хв░▒+punct /
  emptyРєњuntitled), writer x7 (ьїїВЮ╝ ВЃЮВё▒ / M4.4.1 reader round-trip /
  idempotent skip / overwrite=True / multi-line frontmatter strip /
  parent dir ВЃЮВё▒ / non-canonical type ВъЉВё▒ / type_label newline-escape
  injection в░ЕВДђ), list x2 (ВаЋваг / ВЌєвіћ dir empty), batch x2 (ВаёВ▓┤ ВъЉВё▒
  / ЖИ░ВА┤ slug skip). Reader-writer schema drift в░ЕВДђВЮў ьЋхВІгВЮђ
  `test_write_round_trips_with_m4_4_1_reader` Ж░ђ *ВІцВаю* reader вЦ╝ import
  ьЋ┤Вёю вЈЎВЮ╝ ьїїВЮ╝ВЮё parsing Рђћ ьЋю ВфйВЮ┤ schema в│ђЖ▓йьЋўвЕ┤ ВдЅВІю RED. Quality
  gates clean (ruff + mypy + 17/17 pytest).

- **PR-OL-C2 Рђћ few-shot pool writer + autoresearch promote ьўИВХюВъљ.**
  M3 (#1426/#1428) ВЮ┤ reader (`_load_few_shot_pool_override` +
  `apply_few_shot_pool`) вДї ВХюВІюьЋўЖ│а writer вХђВъгвАю exemplars in-context
  slot (M4.4 #1435) Ж░ђ ВўЂЖхг empty pool ВюёВЌљ ВъЉвЈЎьќѕвЇў deception ьЋ┤Вєї.
  **ВІаЖию ьЋеВѕў** `core/llm/few_shot_pool.append_exemplar(user_msg,
  assistant_msg, fitness_delta, source, pool_path, max_size)` Рђћ
  16-hex SHA256 signature idempotent dedup + FIFO eviction
  (`MAX_EXEMPLAR_POOL_SIZE = 1000`). вфевЊѕ `__all__` ВЌљ
  `append_exemplar` + `MAX_EXEMPLAR_POOL_SIZE` вЁИВХю. **autoresearch
  caller** Рђћ `autoresearch/train.py::main()` ВЮў OL-C1 eval emit ВДЂьЏё
  `args.dry_run is False` AND `"true" in promoted_line.lower()` ВІю
  `append_exemplar(source="autoresearch_audit_promote", fitness_delta=
  fitness - mean(baseline_means))` ьўИВХю (rejected pile ВЮђ in-context
  exemplars В▒ёвёљВЌљ вЊцВќ┤Ж░ђВДђ ВЋіЖ▓ї gate). ВаёВ▓┤ try/except вАю Ж░љВІИВаИ
  audit cycle в│┤ьўИ. **mkdir + write_text вфевЉљ вІеВЮ╝ try ВЋѕ** (Codex MCP
  FLAG fix Рђћ mkdir OSError вЈё graceful False в░ўьЎў, raise ВЋѕ ьЋе).
  **14 invariant test** Рђћ signature x2 (determinism + field sensitivity)
  + writer x4 (one row / idempotent / multi-pair / round-trip with
  `_parse_jsonl`) + FIFO x2 (eviction at over-cap + cap constant
  exposed) + graceful x2 (parent dir creation + Unicode preserve) +
  train.py source Ж▓ђВдЮ 4ВбЁ (import ВА┤Въг / promote gate /
  try/except wrap / OL-C1 emit ьЏё ВюёВ╣ў Рђћ order pin). **вЕћьЃђ-level exemplar caveat**:
  audit cycle ВЮў `(prompt, response)` віћ meta-level Рђћ ьќЦьЏё OL-C2.2
  follow-up ВЌљВёю AgenticLoop-turn-level + Petri-per-turn writer ВХћЖ░ђ.

- **PR-OL-C1 Рђћ `eval_response_recorded` ьўИВХюВъљ wiring (autoresearch audit cycle вІеВюё).**
  M4.0 (#1429) ВЮ┤ "deferred to caller wiring" Вю╝вАю вѓеЖИ┤ emit ьЋеВѕўЖ░ђ
  вЊювћћВќ┤ production ВЌљ В▓Ф ьўИВХюВъљ ьџЇвЊЮ. `autoresearch/train.py::main()`
  ВЮў audit_finished journal emit ВДЂьЏё `emit_eval_response_recorded(...)`
  ьўИВХю ВХћЖ░ђ. вДц audit cycle вДѕвІц 1 event ВЃЮВё▒ Рђћ prompt = "audit cycle
  on commit X (seed_select=Y, description=Z)", response = "verdict=W
  fitness=F promoted=P dim_means_count=N", fitness_score = aggregate
  fitness, axis_scores = `{dim_means_aggregate, bench_means_aggregate}`,
  source = `"autoresearch_audit"`, **rollback_flag = `fitness == 0.0 OR
  verdict.lower() in {"reject", "regression"}`** (chosen pile = ВќЉьўИьЋю
  mutation, rejected pile = critical regression вўљвіћ вфЁВІю reject).
  Emit ВаёВ▓┤Ж░ђ try/except вАю Ж░љВІИВаИ audit cycle ВъљВ▓┤віћ Ваѕвїђ break ВЋѕ вље.
  Response payload віћ `verdict=<v> fitness=<f> promoted=<p>
  dim_means_count=<N> bench_means_count=<M>` 5 ьЋёвЊю. **DPO ьїїВЮ┤ьћёвЮ╝ВЮИ
  deception ьЋ┤Вєї** Рђћ M4.1 build_dpo_pack ВЮў journal walker Ж░ђ вЊювћћВќ┤
  *non-empty* stream ВЮё ВЮйВЮї Рєњ M4.2 publisher Ж░ђ ВІцВаю TRL / OpenAI /
  Bedrock ьЋЎВіх вЇ░ВЮ┤ьё░ ВЃЮВё▒ Ж░ђвіЦ. Ж░ЎВЮђ commit вЉљ в▓ѕ audit ВІю
  chosen/rejected pair ВъљвЈЎ ьўЋВё▒. **8 def / 14 runtime case invariant
  test** Рђћ chosen pile + rejected pile + no-scope no-op + train.py
  source Ж▓ђВдЮ 4ВбЁ (import ВА┤Въг / main вѓ┤вХђ / rollback heuristic ВаЋьЎЋ /
  try/except wrap) + rollback heuristic matrix 1 def ├Ќ 7 parametrize.
  **OL-C1.2 (Petri per-turn emit) віћ ьЏёВєЇ** Рђћ `.eval` log walker API
  Ж░ђ stable ьЋю ьЏё ВДёВъЁ.

- **PR-Hermes-1d Рђћ `session_search` LLM tool (Hermes absorption Phase 1d, minimal).**
  Phase 1c (#1439) ВЮў FTS5 ВЮИвЇ▒Віц ВюёВЌљ LLM-вЁИВХю вЈёЖхг ВХћЖ░ђ. ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ
  `core/tools/session_search.py` Рђћ `SessionSearchTool` ВЮ┤
  `SessionManager.search_messages` (1c ВІаВёц) ьўИВХю, Ж▓░Ж│╝вЦ╝ `matched` /
  `count` / `hits[{session_id, message_id, seq, role, timestamp, snippet,
  score}]` ьўЋьЃювАю в░ўьЎў. **5 input field**: `query` (ьЋёВѕў, sanitizer ьєхЖ│╝) +
  `session_id` (ВёаьЃЮ Рђћ вІеВЮ╝ ВёИВЁў scope) + `limit` (default 20, max 100
  clamp) + `prefer_trigram` (CJK / вХђвХё вгИВъљВЌ┤ recall). вЈёЖхгвіћ
  `core/wiring/container.py::build_default_registry` ВЌљ вЊ▒вАЮ +
  `core/tools/definitions.json` ВЮў `memory_search` ВДЂВаёВЌљ schema entry
  ВХћЖ░ђ. **Вџ┤ВўЂВъљ ьЮљвдё**: вДц turn M4.4.1 ВЮў memory_recall ВігвА»ВЮ┤
  *passive* вАю `<memory-recall>` вИћвАЮ ВБ╝ВъЁ. agent Ж░ђ вЇћ ЖхгВ▓┤ВаЂВЮИ *active*
  recall ВЮ┤ ьЋёВџћьЋа вЋї `session_search(query="DPO training",
  prefer_trigram=False)` ВДЂВаЉ ьўИВХю Ж░ђвіЦ. вЉљ В▒ёвёљ в│┤ВЎё Рђћ passive віћ вДц
  turn ВъљвЈЎ, active віћ LLM ВЮўвЈё вфЁВІюВаЂ. **Scope (1d-minimal)**: ьўёВъг
  ьћёвАюВаЮьіИ `sessions.db` вДї; cross-project (`global.db`) + async
  `SearchIndexer` thread + `geode reindex` CLI віћ PR-Hermes-1d.2 вАю
  defer. **14 invariant test** Рђћ surface 2 (name + schema ьЋёВѕў ьЋёвЊю) +
  ВъЁваЦ validation 3 (empty / whitespace / non-str query) + round-trip 1
  + scope filter 1 + trigram CJK recall 1 + empty DB no-hit 1 + limit 2
  (honored / clamped) + invalid limit fallback 1 + registry вЊ▒вАЮ 1 +
  definitions.json schema 1.

- **PR-Hermes-1c Рђћ FTS5 + ьіИвдгЖиИвъе ВЮИвЇ▒Віц (Hermes absorption Phase 1c).**
  Phase 1a (#1338) ВЮў messages ьЁїВЮ┤вИћ + Phase 1b ВЮў SoT flip ВюёВЌљ full-text
  search ВЮИвЇ▒Віц ВІаВёц. **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ** `core/storage/fts_helpers.py` Рђћ
  `sanitize_fts5_query` (Hermes `hermes_state.py:1796` ьїеьё┤ absorb Рђћ ьЋўВЮ┤ьћѕ/
  вЈёьіИ/ВйювАа ьЈгьЋе ьєаьЂ░ВЮё double-quote escape, pure-meta ьєаьЂ░ drop, Unicode
  letter bare ВюаВДђ) + `has_trigram_support` (SQLite 3.34+ trigram tokenize
  capability probe; graceful False on `OperationalError`). **`session_manager.py`
  ьЎЋВъЦ** Рђћ `__init__` Ж░ђ `messages_fts` (unicode61 tokenizer) ВЎђ 3 ьіИвдгЖ▒░
  (insert/delete/update) вЦ╝ ьЋГВЃЂ ВЃЮВё▒, trigram Ж░ђвіЦ ВІю `messages_fts_trigram`
  + ьіИвдгЖ▒░ 3Ж░ю ВХћЖ░ђ (graceful degrade). ьіИвдгЖ▒░віћ generator `_fts_trigger_block`
  Вю╝вАю вІеВЮ╝ SoT Рђћ unicode/trigram вЉљ ьЁїВЮ┤вИћ Ж░ё drift В░евІе. ВІаЖию method
  `search_messages(query, session_id=, limit=, prefer_trigram=)` Ж░ђ sanitize Рєњ
  FTS5 `MATCH ?` В┐╝вдг Рєњ `bm25` ВаљВѕў + `snippet()` highlight в░ўьЎў. **18
  invariant test** Рђћ sanitize 7Ж░ю (empty / bare alnum / hyphenated / dotted /
  internal quote escape / pure-meta drop / Unicode letter bare) + capability
  probe 2Ж░ю (modern OK / bad-conn graceful) + FTS schema 2Ж░ю (tables ВЃЮВё▒ /
  triggers ВЃЮВё▒) + sync 4Ж░ю (insert Рєњ index / round-trip search / session_id
  scope / hyphen query via sanitizer) + trigram 1Ж░ю (Korean вХђвХёвгИВъљВЌ┤
  recall) + delete cascade 1Ж░ю + empty query 1Ж░ю. 5 critical guarantees:
  default вЈЎВъЉ byte-equal (ЖИ░ВА┤ sessions/messages ьќЅВюё в»Ив│ђЖ▓й Рђћ ВІаЖию FTS
  table вДї ВХћЖ░ђ) / trigram ВЌєвіћ SQLite в╣ївЊюВЌљВёювЈё graceful (unicode61 вДї
  ьЎюВё▒) / В┐╝вдг Вѓ░ьІ░ьЃђВЮ┤ВађЖ░ђ FTS5 grammar ВѓгЖ│а В░евІе / contentless FTS
  (`content='messages'`) вЮ╝ вћћВіцьЂг ВѓгВџЕ ВхюВєї / ьіИвдгЖ▒░Ж░ђ ВЮИвЇ▒Віц ВъљвЈЎ
  вЈЎЖИ░ьЎћ (operator ВѕўвЈЎ reindex вХѕьЋёВџћ).

- **PR-M4.4.3 Рђћ `tool_hints` slot reader ьЎюВё▒ьЎћ + M4 sprint ВбЁвБї (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) ВЮў вДѕВДђвДЅ stub ьЎюВё▒ьЎћ Рђћ **вфевЊа 4 in-context slot ВЮ┤Ваю
  ВЎёВаё wired**. ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ `core/self_improving_loop/tool_hints.py` Рђћ
  `~/.geode/memory/episodes.jsonl` (episodic ledger, `core.memory.episodic.EpisodicStore`
  populates) вЦ╝ `RECENT_WINDOW=200` в▓ћВюёвАю ВЮйВќ┤ per-tool ВДЉЖ│ё Рєњ
  `MIN_INVOCATIONS=3` + `FAIL_RATE_THRESHOLD=0.34` вЈЎВІю ьєхЖ│╝ tool вДї
  surface Рєњ `fail_rate desc, total desc` ВаЋваг Рєњ top-K Рєњ `<tool-hints>`
  block Вю╝вАю system prompt ВЋъВЌљ prepend. Ж░Ђ tool ВЮў *Ж░ђВъЦ ВхюЖи╝*
  non-empty error В║АВ│љ (episodes Ж░ђ newest-first ВЮ┤вЮ╝ dict В▓Ф ВДёВъЁВЮ┤
  recent), 80Въљ + ellipsis trim. **Frontier signal**: `stuck_in_loops`
  / `redundant_tool_invocation` вЮ╝в▓еВЮ┤ punish ьЋўвіћ ьїеьё┤ВЮё *ЖиИ ВъљВ▓┤вАю
  in-context prevention* Рђћ agent Ж░ђ "Bash Ж░ђ ВхюЖи╝ 3в▓ѕ ВІцьїеьќѕвёц" в│┤Ж│а
  вІцвЦИ Ваёвъх ВёаьЃЮ Ж░ђвіЦ. **Graceful** Рђћ `EpisodicStore` import ВІцьїе /
  ledger ВЌєВЮї / read error / non-str tool_name вфевЉљ silent skip.
  **18 invariant test** Рђћ `load_recent_episodes` x2 (store ВІцьїе /
  Вё▒Ж│х) + `find_failing_tools` x8 (top_k=0 / min_invocations cap /
  fail_rate threshold / surface / most-recent-error В║АВ│љ / desc sort
  + tiebreak / top_k cap / non-str tool_name skip / 80-char trim) +
  `format_tool_hints_block` x3 (empty / with-error / without-error) +
  orchestrator x2 (block prepend / no-failing no-op). **M4 sprint
  ВбЁвБї** Рђћ M4.0 (#1429 event) Рєњ M4.1 (#1430 pack) Рєњ M4.2 (#1431
  publisher) Рєњ M4.3 (#1434 redaction/stats) Рєњ M4.4 (#1435 orchestrator) Рєњ
  M4.4.1 (#1436 memory_recall) Рєњ M4.4.2 (#1437 rubric_excerpts) Рєњ
  **M4.4.3 в│И PR (tool_hints + closure)**.

- **PR-M4.4.2 Рђћ `rubric_excerpts` slot reader ьЎюВё▒ьЎћ (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) ВЮў вЉљ в▓ѕВДИ stub ВігвА» ьЎюВё▒ьЎћ. ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ
  `core/self_improving_loop/rubric_excerpts.py` Рђћ
  `autoresearch/state/baseline.json` ВЮйВќ┤ `dim_means` vs
  `baseline_means` В░еВЮ┤ Ж│ёВѓ░ Рєњ `baseline_means[d] - dim_means[d] > 0`
  ВЮИ dim вДї (regression positive) top-K desc ВаЋваг Рєњ вѓ┤ВъЦ 17-dim
  `DIM_RUBRIC` ВЮў directive ВЎђ join Рєњ `<rubric-warning>` вИћвАЮ render Рєњ
  orchestrator Ж░ђ system prompt ВЋъВЌљ prepend. `DIM_RUBRIC` ВЮђ 5
  critical + 12 auxiliary = 17Ж░ю fitness dim вфевЉљ cover (ьЁїВіцьіИЖ░ђ
  `autoresearch.train.AXIS_TIERS` ВЎђ вЈЎЖИ░ Ж▓ђВдЮ). **Graceful** Рђћ missing
  / malformed / non-dict baseline вфевЉљ silent no-op. **Per-axis
  type-guard** Рђћ `dim_means[d]` Ж░ђ non-numeric ВЮ┤вЕ┤ ЖиИ dim вДї skip,
  вѓўвеИВДђвіћ ьєхЖ│╝. **Frontier parity** Рђћ Claude Code ВЮў
  `<system-reminder>` + Codex CLI ВЮў `<important_reminders>` ВЎђ вЈЎВЮ╝
  pattern. **17 invariant test** Рђћ `DIM_RUBRIC` 17 cover + вфевЊа entry
  non-empty + `load_baseline` x4 (missing / malformed / non-dict /
  valid) + `find_worst_regressions` x7 (top_k=0 / improving skip /
  desc sort / top_k cap / missing means / non-numeric skip / DIM_RUBRIC
  attach) + `format_rubric_block` x2 (empty / render with unknown-dim
  fallback) + orchestrator x2 (prepend / no-baseline no-op).
  **Remaining stub count after this PR: 1** (tool_hints only,
  M4.4.3 follow-up).

- **PR-M4.4.1 Рђћ `memory_recall` slot reader ьЎюВё▒ьЎћ (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) ВЮў 4 ВігвА» ВцЉ В▓Ф в▓ѕВДИ stub ВЮё ьЎюВё▒ьЎћ. ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ
  `core/self_improving_loop/memory_recall.py` Рђћ frontmatter-style MD
  ьїїВЮ╝ (Claude Code ВЮў auto-memory ВЎђ вЈЎВЮ╝ schema) ВЮё
  `~/.geode/memory/recall/` (вўљвіћ `GEODE_MEMORY_RECALL_DIR` env
  override) ВЌљВёю walk Рєњ `MemoryEntry(name, type, description, body,
  mtime)` вАю parse Рєњ `rank_memory_entries(entries, query, top_k)` Ж░ђ
  keyword overlap ├Ќ recency_weight (`1 / (1 + age_days)`) вАю ВаЋваг Рєњ
  `format_memory_block` ВЮ┤ `<memory-recall>\n- [type] description\n
  ...\n</memory-recall>` вИћвАЮ render. **Orchestrator wiring** Рђћ
  `in_context_wiring.apply_in_context_slots` Ж░ђ `SLOT_MEMORY_RECALL`
  cfg в░юЖ▓г ВІю Вюё 3вІеЖ│ё ьўИВХю, Ж▓░Ж│╝ вИћвАЮВЮё system prompt ВЋъВЌљ
  prepend (per-slot try/except вАю ВІцьїе ВІю graceful). `_latest_user_query`
  helper Ж░ђ messages ВЮў вДѕВДђвДЅ user-role string content ВХћВХю Рєњ similarity
  ranking ВЮў query вАю ВѓгВџЕ. **Per-file graceful** Рђћ frontmatter вѕёвЮй /
  unreadable file / Въўвф╗вљю YAML ВЮђ silent skip. **No-op fast path**
  ВюаВДђ Рђћ recall dir в»ИВА┤Въг ВІю `resolve_recall_dir()` Ж░ђ None в░ўьЎў Рєњ
  reader Ж░ђ `[]` в░ўьЎў Рєњ orchestrator Ж░ђ system в»Ив│ђЖ▓й. **16 invariant
  test** Рђћ resolve x3 (env override / env-missing-graceful / default-missing) +
  load x3 (no-dir / frontmatter parse / malformed skip) + rank x4 (overlap /
  recency tiebreak / top_k=0 / top_k cap) + format x4 (empty / type-tag
  render / **description-only with empty body** / **body-only fallback** Рђћ
  Codex MCP Ж░ђ ВъАВЮђ ternary precedence regression) + orchestrator ьєхьЋЕ x2
  (block prepend / no-dir no-op).

- **PR-M4.4 Рђћ In-context slot wiring orchestrator + provider wiring (ADR-012).**
  M4 DPO pipeline ВЮў closing piece Рђћ S5 (#1425) ВЮў 4-slot schema ВЎђ M3
  (#1426/#1428) ВЮў few-shot pool substrate вЦ╝ ВІцВаю inference path ВЌљ
  ВЌ░Ж▓░. **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ** `core/self_improving_loop/in_context_wiring.py`
  ВЮў `apply_in_context_slots(messages, system="")` orchestrator Рђћ
  S5 `_load_in_context_slots_override()` Ж░ђ None ВЮ┤вЕ┤ input Ж░ЮВ▓┤
  **identity** в░ўьЎў (zero-allocation no-op fast path; default GEODE
  operator віћ ВХћЖ░ђ в╣ёВџЕ 0). slot ьЎюВё▒ ВІю per-slot try/except вАю Ж░Ђ
  reader/apply Ж░ђ вЈЁвдй graceful. **exemplars ВігвА» = ВІцВаю ьЎюВё▒** Рђћ
  M3 ВЮў `_load_few_shot_pool_override` + `apply_few_shot_pool` ВЮё
  ьўИВХю, top-K (user, assistant) ВїЇВЮё messages head ВЌљ prepend.
  fitness_delta desc rank. **memory_recall / rubric_excerpts /
  tool_hints 3 ВігвА» = вфЁВІюВаЂ stub at PR-M4.4 merge time** Рђћ
  orchestrator ВЮ┤ SoT ВЌљВёю ЖиИ ВА┤ВъгвЦ╝ ВЮИВІЮьЋўВДђвДї reader в»ИЖхгьўёВЮ┤вЮ╝
  no-op; ьЏёВєЇ PR Ж░ђ 1Ж░юВћЕ ьЎюВё▒ьЎћ (PR-M4.4.1 #1436 Рєњ memory_recall,
  PR-M4.4.2 Рєњ rubric_excerpts; tool_hints вДї PR-M4.4.3 вїђЖИ░). **Provider
  wiring 2ВДђВаљ** Рђћ `core/llm/providers/anthropic.py::ClaudeAgenticAdapter.agentic_call`
  + `core/llm/providers/openai.py::OpenAIAgenticAdapter.agentic_call`
  ВЮў api-key/circuit-breaker В▓┤ьЂг ВДЂьЏё orchestrator ьўИВХю, Ж▓░Ж│╝вАю
  `(messages, system)` Ж░▒ВІа. вЉљ path вфевЉљ inspect.getsource grep
  assertion Вю╝вАю wiring в│┤ВдЮ. **11 invariant test** Рђћ no-op
  identity 3 (no SoT / в╣ѕ dict / reader exception) + exemplars
  prepend 1 + exemplars в╣ѕ pool no-op + exemplars ВІцьїе graceful +
  system passthrough + 3 stub slot non-error + provider import
  smoke 2 + __all__ minimal export. ContextVar / hook в»ИВѓгВџЕ Рђћ
  вДц LLM call вДѕвІц ContextVar lookup ьЋю в▓ѕвЈё ВЌєвіћ stateless
  orchestrator. Frontier в╣ёЖхљ: Claude Code system prompt /
  Codex CLI `<system-reminder>` ВЮў 4 layer wiring ВЮё mutator-target
  ьЎћ ьЋю explicit schema.

- **PR-M4.3 Рђћ DPO pack PII redaction + stats (ADR-012).**
  M4.1 canonical pack (`~/.geode/self-improving-loop/dpo/pack.jsonl`) Ж░ђ
  user prompts + assistant responses вЦ╝ verbatim Вю╝вАю Ж░ђВДђв»ђвАю M4.2
  publish Ваё PII / secret ВіцьЂгвЪйВЮ┤ ьЋёВѕў. **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_redaction.py` Рђћ `redact_text(text)` Ж░ђ 7
  В╣┤ьЁїЖ│авдг ьїеьё┤ ВаЂВџЕ: API key (Anthropic / OpenAI / Slack / GitHub /
  ZhipuAI Рђћ `core/utils/redaction.py` ВЮў ЖИ░ВА┤ `_SECRET_PATTERNS` ВъгьЎюВџЕ)
  + AWS access key (AKIA / ASIA) + Bearer token + Email + Phone (E.164 /
  dashed / parenthesised) + URL credentials (`https://u:p@host`) + POSIX
  home path (`/Users/<name>/` + `/home/<name>/`). `redact_pack_row(row)`
  Ж░ђ 5 ьЁЇВіцьіИ ьЋёвЊю (`prompt` / `chosen` / `rejected` / `source_chosen` /
  `source_rejected`) вДї ВіцьЂгвЪй, ВѕФВъљ / signature ьЋёвЊювіћ passthrough.
  `redact_pack(src, dst) -> int` Ж░ђ read Рєњ scrub Рєњ write JSONL Рђћ missing
  src Рєњ empty dst ьїїВЮ╝ (graceful), malformed line silent drop, re-run
  byte-equal Ж▓░ВаЋВё▒ в│┤ВъЦ. **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_stats.py`
  Рђћ `pack_stats(path) -> dict` Ж░ђ pair_count / unique_prompts /
  fitness_delta {min,max,mean,median} / source_{chosen,rejected}_histogram
  в░ўьЎў. missing / empty / all-malformed Рєњ в╣ѕ dict (graceful).
  **redaction layer віћ ьџеЖ│╝ВаЂ 7 В╣┤ьЁїЖ│авдг** Рђћ API key віћ `redact_secrets`
  delegate ВЮ┤в»ђвАю вфевЊѕВЮў `PII_PATTERNS` table ВъљВ▓┤віћ 6 entry (URL
  cred / AWS / Bearer / Email / home / Phone) + 1 delegate. **19 + 8
  = 27 invariant test** Рђћ redaction 19 (ьїеьё┤в│ё 9 scrub + empty ьєхЖ│╝ +
  no-match unchanged + composed multi-secret + pattern table sanity +
  pack_row field-scope 2 + redact_pack 4) + stats 8 (missing / empty /
  malformed Рєњ в╣ѕ dict + ЖИ░в│И aggregate / unique_prompts / required
  field вѕёвЮй drop / int coerce / missing source histogram). в│И PR ВЮђ
  в│ђьЎў + ьєхЖ│ёвДї; M4.2 publisher ВЎђ ьЋЕВ│љВёю Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ
  `redact_pack Рєњ publish` ьїїВЮ┤ьћёвЮ╝ВЮИ ВѕўвЈЎ ВЌ«Вќ┤ ВѓгВџЕ. CLI integration ВЮђ
  M4.4 ьЏёВєЇ.

- **PR-PAPERCLIP Рђћ Paperclip pattern wiring for self-improving loop mutator.**
  ВѓгВаё PR (PR-1 G-A) Ж░ђ `MutatorConfig.source = Literal["auto", "api_key",
  "claude-cli", "openai-codex"]` knob вДї вЈёВъЁьќѕЖ│а runner віћ source вЦ╝ *вАюЖиИвДї*
  В░ЇВЌѕвІц. в│И PR ВЮ┤ ВІцВаю dispatch вЦ╝ ВЌ░Ж▓░. **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/cli_subprocess.py` Рђћ `invoke_claude_cli` /
  `invoke_codex_cli` subprocess wrapper. `claude --print --output-format text
  --append-system-prompt <SYS> <USR>` / `codex exec --skip-git-repo-check
  <SYS+USR>` argv shape. binary path віћ `$PATH` ВЮў `claude`/`codex` вўљвіћ env
  override (`GEODE_CLAUDE_CLI_BIN` / `GEODE_CODEX_CLI_BIN`). missing Рєњ
  `CliInvocationError` (ВёцВ╣ў hint вЈЎв┤Ѕ). 180s timeout. **runner в│ђЖ▓й** Рђћ
  `_default_llm_call` Ж░ђ `cfg.mutator.source` Ж▓ђВѓг ьЏё paperclip ВЮ╝ вЋї
  subprocess wrapper ьўИВХю, else ЖИ░ВА┤ API path ВюаВДђ (zero-diff for default
  operators). **UI/UX** Рђћ `/self-improving config` (interactive ВёцВаЋВ░й,
  mutator + petri.<role> + seed_generation.<role> В╗┤ьЈгвёїьіИв│ё provider /
  model / source ВъЁваЦ, Enter вАю ьўёВъгЖ░њ ВюаВДђ, ВЎёвБї ьЏё `/self-improving run`
  В▓┤ВЮ┤вІЮ ВўхВЁў Рђћ ВъЁваЦ ьЋёвЊю *model + source*) + `/self-improving source`
  (ьўёВъг ВЃЂьЃю ьЁїВЮ┤вИћ) + `/self-improving source set <key>=<value>`
  (non-interactive mutator setter). **TOML ВЊ░ЖИ░** Рђћ `_splice_section`
  ьЌгьЇ╝Ж░ђ `~/.geode/config.toml` ВЮў section header вЦ╝ В░ЙВЋё in-place key
  Ж░▒ВІа, вѕёвЮй section ВЮђ append, sibling section в│┤ВА┤. seed-generation
  role ВЊ░ЖИ░віћ **plural `roles.<X>`** path ВѓгВџЕ (loader schema ВЎђ вЈЎЖИ░
  Рђћ Codex MCP catch). `atomic_write_text` + `_toml_escape_basic_string`
  (ЖИ░ВА┤ `cmd_config.py` ьїеьё┤). **18 invariant test** Рђћ argv shape 2 /
  missing binary / env override / в╣ёВаЋВЃЂ exit / **timeout** / runner
  dispatch 3 (claude-cli + codex + api_key вг┤в│ђЖ▓й) / TOML splice 5
  (append + replace + insert + sibling в│┤ВА┤ + ВЮ┤ВіцВ╝ђВЮ┤ьћё) + source set
  3 + **seed-generation roles plural-path round-trip**
  (writer Рєњ loader validate). ВўЂьќЦ в▓ћВюё Рђћ paperclip ВЮђ self-improving
  loop **mutator only** (Q1 ВЮЉвІх). Agentic Loop ВЮ╝ВЃЂ ьўИВХюВЮђ ЖИ░ВА┤ API
  path ЖиИвїђвАю.

- **PR-M4.2 Рђћ DPO publisher adapters (TRL / OpenAI / Bedrock, ADR-012).**
  M4.1 canonical pack ВЮё per-provider DPO ьЋЎВіх ВъЁваЦ ьЈгвДиВю╝вАю в│ђьЎў.
  **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_publisher.py` Рђћ 3 adapter
  ьЋеВѕў (`to_trl_format` / `to_openai_format` / `to_bedrock_format`) +
  `publish_pack(target, pack_path, out_path) -> int` dispatcher. вфевЊа
  в│ђьЎўВЮђ **pure transform** Рђћ network call / SDK import / API key
  read ВЮ╝В▓┤ ВЌєВЮї. Вџ┤ВўЂВъљвіћ Ж▓░Ж│╝ JSONL ВЮё provider ВЮў upload tool
  (`openai files create` / `aws s3 cp` / `hf datasets push`) ВЌљ ВаёвІг.
  **Idempotency** Рђћ `publish_pack` Ж░ђ destination ВЮё вДцв▓ѕ overwrite
  ьЋўв»ђвАю вЈЎВЮ╝ (pack, target) ВъЁваЦВЮђ byte-equal output ВЃЮВё▒.
  **Adapter в│ё row schema**: TRL = ВхюВєї triple `{prompt, chosen,
  rejected}` (TRL DPOTrainer ВДЂВаЉ Вєїв╣ё). OpenAI = messages ВіцьЃђВЮ╝
  `{input.messages, preferred_output, non_preferred_output}` (OpenAI
  preference fine-tuning guide ВЮў schema). Bedrock = generic
  passthrough `{prompt, chosen, rejected, signature, fitness_chosen,
  fitness_rejected, fitness_delta}` (base model family в│ё schema
  ьјИВ░еЖ░ђ В╗цВёю Вџ┤ВўЂВъљЖ░ђ ьЏёВ▓ўвдгьЋўвЈёвАЮ audit metadata ВюаВДђ). **Graceful**
  Рђћ missing pack file Рєњ 0 rows + empty out file. Malformed JSONL line
  + в╣ё dict + prompt/chosen/rejected str вѕёвЮй row віћ silently drop.
  **ValueError** Рђћ `SUPPORTED_TARGETS = ("trl", "openai", "bedrock")`
  ВЎИ target. в│И PR ВЮђ transform вДї; CLI integration + network upload
  + PII redaction (M4.3) ВЮђ ьЏёВєЇ. **14 invariant test** Рђћ TRL minimal
  triple / OpenAI messages schema / Bedrock fitness в│┤ВА┤ + вѕёвЮй graceful
  / SUPPORTED_TARGETS manifest / publish_pack one-row-per-pack-row /
  overwrite / byte-equal rerun / missing pack empty file / invalid
  target ValueError / malformed line drop / openai+bedrock dispatch /
  no-network import guard (forbidden SDK 8ВбЁ stdlib ВЎИ в»ИВаЂВъг).

- **PR-M4.1 Рђћ DPO canonical preference-pack JSONL writer (ADR-012).**
  Consumes M4.0 ВЮў `eval_response_recorded` event stream Рєњ Ж░Ђ unique
  `prompt` group ВЮё chosen pile (`rollback_flag=False`) + rejected pile
  (`rollback_flag=True`) вАю вХёьЋа Рєњ **top-fitness chosen ├Ќ bottom-fitness
  rejected** 1 pair вЦ╝ emit (Ж░ђВъЦ ВёавфЁьЋю fitness margin = DPO ьЋЎВіх ВІаьўИ
  Вхювїђ). **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_pack.py` Рђћ
  `build_dpo_pack(journal_paths, pack_path) -> BuildResult` (appended /
  duplicate / events_seen / unpaired count) + `pair_signature(prompt,
  chosen, rejected)` 16-hex ВІЮв│ёВъљ + `BuildResult` frozen dataclass.
  **Idempotency** Рђћ signature-keyed dedup Вю╝вАю ВъгВІцьќЅ ВІю ВІаЖию pair вДї
  append; ЖИ░ВА┤ pack rows в│┤ВА┤. **Graceful** Рђћ missing journal file Рєњ
  empty В▓ўвдг, malformed JSONL line ВЮђ silently drop (per-line parse
  guard). Pack Ж▓йвАю `GLOBAL_DPO_PACK_PATH = ~/.geode/self-improving-loop/dpo/pack.jsonl`
  (operator-local, NOT git-tracked Рђћ preference data віћ M4.3 redaction
  Ж╣їВДђ ВѓгВџЕВъљ-ВѓгВаЂ). **Pack schema** Рђћ `signature` / `prompt` /
  `chosen` / `rejected` / `fitness_chosen` / `fitness_rejected` /
  `fitness_delta` / `ts_chosen` / `ts_rejected` / `session_id_chosen` /
  `session_id_rejected` / `source_chosen` / `source_rejected` (13
  field). в│И PR ВЮђ transform вДї; M4.2 publisher (OpenAI / Bedrock /
  HuggingFace TRL adapter) віћ ьЏёВєЇ. **12 invariant test** Рђћ signature
  determinism + field-sensitivity / empty journal / missing-file
  graceful / pair-selection top├Ќbottom / chosen-only + rejected-only
  unpaired / idempotency ВъгВІцьќЅ zero append / ВІаЖию prompt вДї append /
  multi-journal cross-session merge / malformed line drop. Rafailov
  2023 DPO formulation ВЮў `(x, y_w, y_l)` triple Ж│╝ ВДЂВаЉ ВаЋьЋЕ.

- **PR-M4.0 Рђћ `eval_response_recorded` SessionJournal event (ADR-012).**
  DPO pipeline (M4.x) ВЮў В▓Ф piece Рђћ Ж░Ђ (prompt, response) turn вДѕвІц
  fitness ВИАВаЋЖ░њ + ьЈЅЖ░ђ metadata вЦ╝ active SessionJournal ВЌљ emit.
  M4.1 ВЮў DPO canonical pack JSONL writer Ж░ђ ВЮ┤ stream ВЮё вћ░вЮ╝Ж░ђвЕ░
  chosen/rejected pile вЮ╝в▓евДЂ. **ВІаЖию вфевЊѕ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/eval_journaling.py` Рђћ `EVENT_NAME` constant +
  `emit_eval_response_recorded(prompt, response, fitness_score,
  axis_scores, source, rollback_flag)` helper. Active scope ВЎИВЌљВёю
  graceful no-op (False в░ўьЎў) Рђћ ьўИВХюВъљ try/except вХѕьЋёВџћ. `rollback_flag`
  Ж░ђ True вЕ┤ user revert ВІаьўИ (M4.1 rejected вЮ╝в▓е). `axis_scores` Ж░ђ
  None / в╣ѕ dict вЕ┤ payload key omit (forward-compat). int / bool Ж░њВЮђ
  float coerce. в│И PR ВЮђ emit ьЋеВѕў + payload schema вДї; emit ьўИВХю site
  (Petri audit / live session / replay test вЊ▒) віћ ьЏёВєЇ PR ВЌљВёю wiring.
  **11 invariant test** Рђћ event name + no-scope no-op + minimal payload +
  full payload + rollback flag (true/default) + axis_scores omit (None /
  empty) + float coerce 2 + multi-event append. Voyager / STaR ВЮў
  successful-trajectory journaling ьїеьё┤ ЖиИвїђвАю.

- **PR-M3 Рђћ Few-shot exemplar pool ВъљвЈЎ ВаЂВъг (ADR-012).** S5 (#1425)
  ВЌљВёю declared вДї вљљвЇў `exemplars` slot ВЮў ВІцВаю *ВаЂВъг вЕћВ╗цвІѕВдў* ВІаВёц.
  fitness gate ьєхЖ│╝ьЋю task-completion candidate ВЮў `(user_msg,
  assistant_msg, fitness_delta, source)` triple ВЮё JSONL append-only
  вАю ВХЋВаЂ; runtime ВЌљ top-K Вёав│ёьЋ┤ messages ВЋъВЌљ in-context exemplar
  pair вАю ВѓйВъЁ. **5-element ьїеьё┤**: SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/few-shot-pool.jsonl` + operator-local /
  `GLOBAL_FEW_SHOT_POOL_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_FEW_SHOT_POOL_PATH`
  ВХћЖ░ђ / `core/llm/few_shot_pool.py` reader (`FewShotExemplar` frozen
  dataclass + `_load_few_shot_pool_override` + `apply_few_shot_pool`) /
  inference entry віћ M4.4 deferred (ьўё PR ВЮђ SoT + reader + apply
  ьЋеВѕўвДї, anthropic.py / openai.py ВЮў message ВА░вдйвХђ wiring ВЮђ
  ьЏёВєЇ PR) / `GEODE_FEW_SHOT_POOL_OVERRIDE` + `_STRICT=1` env pair.
  **Per-line graceful** Рђћ JSONL ьЋю ВцёВЮ┤ broken ВЮ┤Вќ┤вЈё вѓўвеИВДђ ВцёВЮђ
  ВюаВДђ (`_parse_jsonl` вІеВюё). bool fitness_delta вЊ▒ type trap Рєњ
  0.0 coerce. missing/empty user_msg/assistant_msg Рєњ skip. T5 (cache
  policy) ВЎђ ьўИьЎў Рђћ exemplar prefix Ж░ђ Anthropic cache breakpoint
  ВЮў stable prefix вАю ВъљВЌ░ВіцвЪйЖ▓ї ВаЋваг. **23 invariant test** Рђћ
  reader 11 (None / empty / blank / valid / per-line graceful /
  missing field / non-dict / fitness coerce / bool trap / strict /
  operator-local) + apply 6 (None / empty / max=0 / single insert /
  top-K rank / cap / no-mutate) + 3-layer wiring + path const +
  env wiring + ALIVE marker. Voyager / STaR ВЮў *successful trajectory
  pool* ьїеьё┤ ЖиИвїђвАю Рђћ ВъљЖИ░ Вё▒Ж│х ВѓгвАђвЦ╝ вІцВЮї cycle ВЮў in-context
  exemplar вАю ВъгьѕгВъЁ.

- **PR-M2 Рђћ Agent contract mutation slot (ADR-012).** AgentDefinition
  ВЮў `role` / `system_prompt` / `tools` вЦ╝ mutator Ж░ђ evolve. `model`
  field віћ Tier 2 (ВЋѕВаёВё▒ invariants root) Рђћ в│И surface ВЌљВёю вфЁВІюВаЂ
  ВаюВЎИ (mutator Ж░ђ provider ВъёВЮў в│ђЖ▓йВю╝вАю safety guardrail Вџ░ьџї в░ЕВДђ).
  5-element ьїеьё┤: SoT `autoresearch/state/policies/agent-contracts.json`
  (+ operator-local) / `GLOBAL_AGENT_CONTRACTS_PATH` +
  `OPERATOR_LOCAL_AGENT_CONTRACTS_PATH` ВХћЖ░ђ /
  `core/agent/agent_contracts_policy.py` reader (`_load_agent_contracts_override`
  + `apply_agent_contracts_policy(agent_def, policy)` Рђћ `model_copy(update=...)`
  вАю ВЃѕ instance в░ўьЎў, ВЏљв│И immutable) /
  `core/agent/sub_agent.py:resolve_agent` Ж░ђ `_agent_registry.get()` ВДЂьЏё
  `apply_agent_contracts_policy(...)` ьўИВХю / `autoresearch/train.py`
  env wiring + `core/self_improving_loop/policies.py:TARGET_KINDS`
  5 Рєњ 6 (skill_catalog вњц agent_contract ВХћЖ░ђ). M1 ВЮў nested Рєћ flat
  в│ђьЎў helper вЦ╝ ВЮ╝в░ўьЎћ (`_BOOL_FIELDS_BY_KIND` / `_LIST_FIELDS_BY_KIND`
  / `_NESTED_KINDS` frozenset) Рђћ `tools` field віћ list[str] ВЮ┤в»ђвАю
  comma-separated string Вю╝вАю flat Рєћ list[str] в│ђьЎў. `_coerce` Ж░ђ
  `model` field вфЁВІюВаЂ drop (Tier 2 guardrail in code). **18 invariant
  test** Рђћ dispatcher 4 + reader 8 + apply 5 + dispatcher round-trip 2
  + M1 BC 1 + model preservation 1. **22 ВІаЖию test** (ВъгВДЉЖ│ё Рђћ Codex
  MCP correction). M1 ВЮў invariant test вЈё 5РєњРЅЦ5 Вю╝вАю ВЎёьЎћ (count grow
  forward-compat). M2 ьЋЕвЦў ьЏё **4 stale test set Ж░▒ВІа** (m1 +
  policy_mutation + adr_012 + 5_slot_audit).

- **PR-M1 Рђћ Skill mutation slot Ж░юьєх (ADR-012).** T2 (#1418) ВЮў
  `skill-catalog.json` reader вЦ╝ mutator ВЮў mutation contract Ж░ђ
  ВІцВаювАю mutate ьЋа Вѕў ВъѕвЈёвАЮ dispatcher ьЎЋВъЦ. `core/self_improving_loop/
  policies.py:TARGET_KINDS` Ж░ђ 4 Рєњ 5 (prompt / tool_policy /
  decomposition / reflection + **skill_catalog**). retrieval ВЮђ S0d
  deprecation ВюаВДђ (ьўё 5-slot ВЌљ ьЈгьЋе X). вІцвЦИ 4 kind ВЎђ вІгвдг
  skill_catalog ВЮў disk shape віћ **nested**
  (`{skill_name: {description, user_invocable}}`) Рђћ mutation row ВЮў
  `target_section` ВЮђ string вДї ьЌѕВџЕьЋўв»ђвАю **dotted-key flat Рєћ nested**
  в│ђьЎў layer ВХћЖ░ђ:
  - `_flatten_nested(disk_dict) Рєњ flat dotted-key dict`: load_policy
    Ж░ђ runner ВЌљ flat shape в░ўьЎў (вІцвЦИ 4 kind ВЎђ вЈЎВЮ╝ contract).
  - `_unflatten_nested(flat) Рєњ nested dict`: write_policy Ж░ђ T2-reader
    ьўИьЎў shape вАю ВађВъЦ. `user_invocable` вЊ▒ bool field віћ `"true"`/
    `"false"` Рєњ bool coerce.
  **End-to-end consistency invariant** Рђћ `M1 write_policy` Ж░ђ ВЊ┤ file
  ВЮё `T2 reader (_validate_schema + _coerce)` Ж░ђ ЖиИвїђвАю parse ьЋ┤ВЋ╝
  ьЋе. 16 invariant test Ж░ђ round-trip + BC + dispatcher state вфевЉљ
  Ж▓ђВдЮ. tests/test_self_improving_5_slot_reader_audit.py +
  test_adr_012_surface_tiers.py + test_policy_mutation.py ВЮў 4-slot
  expected set вЈё 5-slot вАю Ж░▒ВІа (M1 ьЋЕвЦў). ВІаЖию 18 invariant test
  (test_m1_skill_mutation_slot.py) + 3 stale set Ж░▒ВІа.

- **PR-S5 Рђћ 4ВбЁ in-context slot вфЁВІюВаЂ schema (ADR-012).** GEODE ВЮў
  agent Ж░ђ вДц turn вДѕвІц system prompt + tool messages ВЌљ ВБ╝ВъЁьЋўвіћ
  dynamic context ВЮў **4 canonical slot category** вЦ╝ explicit JSON
  schema вАю ьЉювЕ┤ьЎћ. M4.4 ьЏёВєЇ PR ВЮ┤ ВЮ┤ schema вЦ╝ inference path ВЌљВёю
  Вєїв╣ёьЋа wiring ВЮё вІ┤вІ╣; в│И PR ВЮђ schema + reader + validation вДї
  (no inference wiring Рђћ explicit ВЮўвЈё). **4 slot**: `exemplars`
  (Elo top-K), `memory_recall` (~/.geode/memory/), `rubric_excerpts`
  (Petri worst-dim rubric), `tool_hints` (RunLog ВЮў tool-specific ьъїьіИ).
  **5-element ьїеьё┤**: SoT `autoresearch/state/policies/in-context-slots.json`
  + operator-local / `GLOBAL_IN_CONTEXT_SLOTS_PATH` +
  `OPERATOR_LOCAL_IN_CONTEXT_SLOTS_PATH` ВХћЖ░ђ /
  `core/self_improving_loop/in_context_slots.py` reader
  (`_load_in_context_slots_override` + frozen `InContextSlot`
  dataclass) / inference entry M4.4 deferred /
  `GEODE_IN_CONTEXT_SLOTS_OVERRIDE` + `_STRICT=1` env pair. Per-slot
  `injection_point` ВЮђ enum (`system_prompt` / `tool_descriptions`)
  Рђћ mutator ВЮў typo Ж░ђ silent injection Вю╝вАю Ж░ђВДђ ВЋівЈёвАЮ graceful
  drop. `_coerce` Ж░ђ unknown slot + invalid max_entries (negative /
  bool) + unknown injection_point ВЁІ вІц per-axis graceful drop.
  **20 invariant test** Рђћ canonical schema 4 + loader 11 + path 1 +
  env wiring 1 + ALIVE marker 1 + frozen dataclass 1 + operator-local
  priority 1. Frontier: Claude Code / Codex CLI ВЮў hardcoded layout
  ВЮё mutator-optimizable JSON schema вАю ьЉювЕ┤ьЎћ.

- **PR-S4 Рђћ task-completion seed cohort (ADR-012).** seed-generation ВЌљ
  cohort Ж░ювЁљ вЈёВъЁ Рђћ Вќ┤вќц *axis* ВЮў regression ВЮё вІцВЮї generation ВЮ┤ Ж│хЖ▓ЕьЋаВДђ
  Ж▓░ВаЋ. `petri_17dim` (default, BC) ВЎђ `task_completion` (S4 ВІаВёц) 2 cohort
  вАю ВІюВъЉ, ВХћьЏё `admire_routing` / `bench_capability` ьЎЋВъЦ forward-compat.
  **`plugins/seed_generation/baseline_reader.py`**: (a) 3 ВІаЖию constant
  `PETRI_17DIM_COHORT` / `TASK_COMPLETION_COHORT` / `SEED_COHORTS` export,
  (b) ВІаЖию picker `pick_regression_target(snapshot, cohort)` Рђћ cohort в│ё
  signal direction В▓ўвдг: petri віћ MAX (вєњВЮёВѕўвАЮ concerning, rubric
  invariant), task_completion ВЮђ MIN (ux_means ВЮў normalized-higher-is-better
  contract вћ░вЮ╝ lowest Ж░ђ worst). Tie-break alphabetical. Unknown cohort
  Рєњ `ValueError`. **`plugins/seed_generation/orchestrator.py:PipelineState`**:
  `cohort: str = "petri_17dim"` field ВХћЖ░ђ (BC). **ЖИ░ВА┤
  `pick_regression_target_dim` unchanged** Рђћ pre-S4 caller ЖиИвїђвАю.
  **13 invariant test** Рђћ cohort enum 3 + petri picker 2 +
  task_completion picker 3 + validation 2 + BC 2 + export 1.
  Generator/critic/evolver ВЮў cohort-specific prompt + CLI `--cohort`
  flag ВЮђ S4b ьЏёВєЇ PR (ВЮ┤ PR ВЮђ picker + state schema вДї).

- **PR-S3 Рђћ Ж│хвЈЎ ratchet: 4ВХЋ baseline.json (ADR-012).** `baseline.json`
  schema Ж░ђ pre-S3 `{dim_means, dim_stderr}` ВЌљВёю S3 ВЮў **5-field 4ВХЋ
  schema** `{dim_means, dim_stderr, ux_means, admire_means, bench_means}`
  вАю ьЎЋВъЦ. compute_fitness віћ ВЮ┤в»И 4ВХЋ signature ВўђВю╝вѓў `_write_baseline`
  / `_load_baseline` Ж░ђ dim вДї persist ьќѕвЇў GAP ВЮё closure. seed-generation
  ВЮў `BaselineSnapshot` вЈё 3 ВІаЖию field ВХћЖ░ђ (`ux_means` / `admire_means`
  / `bench_means`) Рђћ вфевЉљ default `{}` вАю pre-S3 baseline ЖиИвїђвАю graceful
  вАювћЕ. `autoresearch/train.py`: (a) `_write_baseline` Ж░ђ 3 ВІаЖию axis
  kwarg-optional (`None`/`{}` ВЮђ payload omit, backwards compat),
  (b) `_load_baseline` 5-tuple в░ўьЎў + ВІаЖию `_coerce_axis_dict` helper
  вАю per-axis graceful drop (вІеВЮ╝ axis ВєљВЃЂВЮ┤ load-bearing dim вХђвХёВЮё
  invalidate вф╗ьЋе), (c) main ВЮў `compute_fitness` ьўИВХюВЮ┤ baseline_bench_means
  вЈё ВаёвІг Рєњ S6 cross-validation gate ВЮў baseline ВИАВЮђ disk ьєхьЋЕ ВЎёвБї
  (current `bench_means`/`ux_means`/`admire_means` collector wiring ВЮђ
  S1b/S2b/S6b ьЏёВєЇ PR Рђћ ЖиИ PR Ж░ђ main() ВЌљ current axis вДї ВХћЖ░ђьЋўвЕ┤
  S6 gate ВдЅВІю в░юьЎћ),
  (d) `baseline_decision` journal event ВЌљ `baseline_axis_coverage`
  (ux/admire/bench ВЮў entry Ж░»Вѕў) surface Рђћ partial baseline Ж░ђВІюВё▒.
  `plugins/seed_generation/baseline_reader.py`: `BaselineSnapshot` ВЌљ
  ux/admire/bench 3 field ВХћЖ░ђ, `load_baseline` Ж░ђ 3 axis вЈё `_coerce_dim_dict`
  ьєхьЋ┤ graceful вАювћЕ. **14 invariant test** Рђћ loader 6 (5-tuple shape +
  missing file + pre-S3 BC + full S3 + per-axis corruption isolation +
  missing dim_means) + writer 3 (default omit + full 4-axis + empty-axis
  omit) + round-trip 1 + snapshot 3 (3 new fields + populated + pre-S3
  empty) + main wiring source-grep 1. ADR-012 S1/S2/S6 ВЮў in-memory 4ВХЋ
  fitness Ж░ђ ВЮ┤Ваю disk Ж╣їВДђ ьєхьЋЕ Рђћ joint ratchet ВЎёВё▒.

- **PR-T6 Рђћ Heuristic indicators JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).**
  mutator Ж░ђ keyword/phrase library вЦ╝ evolve Рђћ task-triage ВІю вДцВ╣Гвљўвіћ
  complexity / high_risk / time_pressure ьЉюВДђВќ┤. Promptbreeder-ВІЮ
  ВДёьЎћ: 3 group ВЮў phrase list Ж░ђ JSON ВЌљВёю mutate Рєњ agent ВЮў task
  classification ВаЋьЎЋвЈё Рєњ ВаЂВаѕьЋю strategy ВёаьЃЮ (careful/fast,
  confirm-first/proceed) Рєњ ux_means.success_rate ВўЂьќЦ. **T3 (style
  guide enum)** Ж│╝ вХёвдг: T3 віћ fixed style ВёаьЃЮ, T6 віћ concrete phrase
  library. **5-element ьїеьё┤** (S0a Ж▓ђВдЮ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/heuristics.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/heuristics.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_HEURISTICS_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_HEURISTICS_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` ВХћЖ░ђ / `core/agent/heuristics_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_heuristics_override` + `apply_heuristics_policy`, schema
  `{complexity_indicators / high_risk_indicators / time_pressure_indicators:
  list[str]}`) / `core/agent/system_prompt.py:build_system_prompt` Ж░ђ
  T3 style-guide apply ВДЂьЏё `static = apply_heuristics_policy(static,
  _load_heuristics_override())` ьўИВХю Рєњ static (cache-eligible) ВўЂВЌГВЌљ
  `<heuristic_indicators>` вИћвАЮ append (ВаЋВ▒Ё вХђВъг ВІю static ЖиИвїђвАю Рђћ
  no behavior change) / `GEODE_HEURISTICS_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_HEURISTICS_STRICT=1` env pair. `_coerce` Ж░ђ unknown group +
  empty string + duplicate phrase ВЁІ вІц graceful drop (forward-compat +
  order-preserving dedupe). XML escape вАю `<`, `&`, `"` ВЋѕВаё В▓ўвдг.
  **25 invariant test** Рђћ reader graceful/strict 13 + apply 7 + wiring +
  path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Promptbreeder (Fernando et al.,
  2023) curriculum loop. **T6 веИВДђ ВІю ADR-013 6 surface ВІюьђђВіц ВбЁЖ▓░**
  (T1 #1416 + T2 #1418 + T3 #1419 + T4 #1420 + T5 #1421 + T6 #1422).

- **PR-T5 Рђћ Cache breakpoint policy JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).**
  mutator Ж░ђ Anthropic API ВЮў `apply_messages_cache_control(messages,
  n_breakpoints=N)` ВЮў N Ж░њВЮё JSON Вю╝вАю mutate (0..3, Anthropic cap ВЮў
  messages-block ВаљВюавХё). **trade-off**: РєЉ Рєњ cache hit rate РєЉ but
  per-call overhead РєЉ (Ж░Ђ breakpoint Ж░ђ $0.10/MTok overhead); РєЊ Рєњ cache
  hit РєЊ but per-call cost РєЊ. ux_means.token_cost_norm + latency_norm
  вЉў вІц ВўЂьќЦ. **5-element ьїеьё┤** (S0a Ж▓ђВдЮ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/cache-policy.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/cache-policy.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_CACHE_POLICY_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_CACHE_POLICY_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` ВХћЖ░ђ / `core/llm/cache_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_cache_policy_override` + `apply_cache_policy_breakpoints`,
  schema `{messages_breakpoints: int 0..3}`) / `core/llm/providers/
  anthropic.py` ВЮў streaming Ж▓йвАю (ьўёВъг ьЎюВё▒ single consumer) ВЌљВёю
  `n_breakpoints = apply_cache_policy_breakpoints(MAX_MESSAGE_CACHE_BREAKPOINTS,
  _load_cache_policy_override())` ьўИВХю Рєњ `apply_messages_cache_control(
  messages, n_breakpoints=n_breakpoints)` вАю wire (ВаЋВ▒Ё вХђВъг ВІю default
  3 Рђћ no behavior change) / `GEODE_CACHE_POLICY_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_CACHE_POLICY_STRICT=1` env pair. `_validate_schema` Ж░ђ Python
  `bool` ВЮё вфЁВІюВаЂВю╝вАю int ВЌљВёю ВаюВЎИ (Python ВЮў bool-is-int subclass
  ьЋеВаЋ в░ЕВќ┤). out-of-range Ж░њ (4, -1, ...) ВЮђ `_coerce` ВЌљВёю per-axis
  graceful drop. **20 invariant test** Рђћ reader graceful/strict 10 +
  apply 5 + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Anthropic
  prompt caching docs Рђћ `cache_control` count Ж░ђ canonical knob.

- **PR-T4 Рђћ Provider routing JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  Ж░ђ per-model preferred plan-chain ВЮё JSON Вю╝вАю mutate. `resolve_routing(
  model)` ВЮў explicit-chain branch Ж░ђ registry's `set_routing` Ж▓░Ж│╝ вїђВІа
  policy override ВЮў chain ВЮё iterate Рєњ ux_means.token_cost_norm ВДЂВаЉ
  ВўЂьќЦ (Ж░ЎВЮђ model ВЮё PAYG вїђВІа SUBSCRIPTION Вю╝вАю route ьЋўвЕ┤ per-call
  cost Ж░љВєї). **5-element ьїеьё┤** (S0a Ж▓ђВдЮ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/provider-routing.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/provider-routing.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` ВХћЖ░ђ / `core/llm/routing/provider_routing_policy.py`
  reader (`_load_provider_routing_override` +
  `apply_provider_routing_policy`, schema `{model_name: [plan_id_chain]}`) /
  `core/llm/routing/plan_registry.py:resolve_routing` explicit-chain branch
  Ж░ђ `apply_provider_routing_policy(model, registry.get_routing(model),
  _load_provider_routing_override())` Ж▓░Ж│╝ iterate (ВаЋВ▒Ё вХђВъг ВІю default
  chain Рђћ no behavior change) / `GEODE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_STRICT=1` env pair. `_coerce` Ж░ђ empty chain +
  empty string entry ВаюЖ▒░. вЊ▒вАЮвљўВДђ ВЋіВЮђ plan_id віћ `resolve_routing` ВЮ┤
  ВъљвЈЎВю╝вАю Ж▒┤вёѕвюђ (registry.get Ж▓░Ж│╝ None ВЮ╝ вЋї skip). **21 invariant
  test** Рђћ reader graceful/strict 10 + apply 6 В╝ђВЮ┤Віц (none / empty /
  model-not-in-policy / override / empty-chain-fallthrough / return-copy)
  + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: OpenRouterВЮў explicit
  per-model plan ordering + Anthropic/OpenAI multi-tier credential
  (subscription/PAYG/batch) ВЮў cost lever.

- **PR-T3 Рђћ Response style guide JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  Ж░ђ 4 typed enum field (`tone` Рѕѕ concise/balanced/verbose, `verbosity_level`
  Рѕѕ low/medium/high, `response_format` Рѕѕ markdown/plain/structured,
  `code_style` Рѕѕ show-first/explain-first) ВЮё JSON Вю╝вАю mutate. wrapper-
  sections.json (G5a/G5b) ВЮў free-form ьЁЇВіцьіИ mutation Ж│╝ вХёвдг Рђћ T3 віћ
  **constrained typed ВёаьЃЮВДђ** вЮ╝ ВъЉВЮђ expressive style space вЦ╝ ьџеВюеВаЂВю╝вАю
  ьЃљВЃЅ Ж░ђвіЦ. fitness 4ВХЋВЮў `ux_means` (success_rate + revert_ratio) ВДЂВаЉ
  ВўЂьќЦ. **5-element ьїеьё┤** (S0a Ж▓ђВдЮ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/style-guide.json` (in-repo, ratchet-tracked) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/style-guide.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_STYLE_GUIDE_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_STYLE_GUIDE_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` ВХћЖ░ђ / `core/agent/style_guide_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_style_guide_override` + `apply_style_guide_policy`, schema
  `{tone, verbosity_level, response_format, code_style}` enum-typed) /
  `core/agent/system_prompt.py:build_system_prompt` Ж░ђ `static =
  apply_style_guide_policy(static, _load_style_guide_override())` вАю
  static ВўЂВЌГ (cache-eligible) ВЌљ `<response_style>` вИћвАЮ append (ВаЋВ▒Ё
  вХђВъг ВІю static ЖиИвїђвАю Рђћ no behavior change) / `GEODE_STYLE_GUIDE_OVERRIDE`
  + `GEODE_STYLE_GUIDE_STRICT=1` env pair (`autoresearch/train.py` audit
  subprocess). `_coerce` Ж░ђ unknown field + unknown enum value вЉў вІц
  graceful drop Рђћ forward-compat + per-axis isolation (ьЋю axis Ж░ђ Ж╣еВаИвЈё
  вІцвЦИ axes віћ Вюаьџе). **22 invariant test** Рђћ reader graceful/strict 10 +
  apply 7 В╝ђВЮ┤Віц (none / empty / single / all / unknown-enum / empty-base /
  field order) + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: OpenAI /
  Anthropic system prompt guides converge on enum-based response constraints.

- **PR-T2 Рђћ Skill catalog JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  Ж░ђ skill `description` (LLM вЮ╝Вџ░ьїЁ ьѓц) + `user_invocable` (Ж░ђВІюВё▒) ВЮё
  per-skill вІеВюёвАю JSON Вю╝вАю mutate Рєњ agent ВЮў skill ВёаьЃЮ ВаЋьЎЋвЈё РєЉ
  (Voyager ВІЮ curriculum ВДёьЎћ ьїеьё┤). **5-element ьїеьё┤** (S0a Ж▓ђВдЮ):
  SoT `autoresearch/state/policies/skill-catalog.json` (in-repo,
  ratchet-tracked) + `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/skill-catalog.json`
  (operator-local) / `GLOBAL_SKILL_CATALOG_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_SKILL_
  CATALOG_PATH` `core/paths.py` ВХћЖ░ђ / `core/skills/skill_catalog_policy.py`
  reader (`_load_skill_catalog_override` + `apply_skill_catalog_policy`,
  schema `{skill_name: {description: str, user_invocable: bool}}`) /
  `core/agent/loop/_context.py` ВЮў `_build_system_prompt` Ж░ђ ЖИ░ВА┤
  `registry.get_context_block()` ьўИВХю ВъљвдгВЌљ `apply_skill_catalog_policy(
  registry, _load_skill_catalog_override())` ьўИВХю (ВаЋВ▒Ё вХђВъг ВІю base
  registry ВЮў `get_context_block` Вю╝вАю ВюёВъё Рђћ no behavior change) /
  `GEODE_SKILL_CATALOG_OVERRIDE` + `GEODE_SKILL_CATALOG_STRICT=1` env
  pair (`autoresearch/train.py` ВЮў audit subprocess Ж░ђ SoT ВА┤Въг ВІю вЉў
  вІц inject Рђћ strict-fail ВўхьіИВЮИ). `apply_skill_catalog_policy` віћ
  registry ВЮў base XML ваївЇћвДЂ вАюВДЂВЮё ВъгВѓгВџЕьЋўвЕ┤Вёю per-skill override
  вЦ╝ Вџ░Вёа ВаЂВџЕ Рђћ base registry Ж░ђ authoritative (unknown skill name ВЮђ
  вг┤ВІю). Forward-compat: entry вѓ┤ unknown field ВъљвЈЎ drop. **23
  invariant test** Рђћ reader graceful/strict + apply 9 В╝ђВЮ┤Віц (none /
  empty / desc / visibility true/false / unknown skill / empty registry /
  max_chars ВаѕвІе / XML escape) + context.py wiring source-grep + path
  ВЃЂВѕў 2 + env wiring + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Voyager (Wang et al.,
  2023) curriculum loop Рђћ agent Ж░ђ ВъљВ▓┤ skill library + description ВЮё
  loop Вю╝вАю Ж░▒ВІа. AlphaEvolve-ВІЮ ВйћвЊю mutation в░░Ваю (skill body=SKILL.md
  віћ Tier 2, в│И surface в»ИВаЉЖи╝).

- **PR-BACKFILL-SOT Рђћ Operator-local SoT layer + env-as-SoT for 4 mutation
  surface readers (post-PR-T1 #1416 fix).** PR #1416 ВЮў Codex MCP FAIL #5
  (CHANGELOG/PR-body parity Вюёв░ў Рђћ `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/...`
  operator-local fallback ВЮё ВБ╝ВъЦьќѕВю╝вѓў reader ВйћвЊю вХђВъг) ВЮў Жи╝ВЏљ GAP ВЮё
  вЕћВЏђ. 4 reader (tool_policy / reflection / decomposition / tool_descriptions)
  Ж░ђ **3-layer SoT chain** Вю╝вАю ВаёьЎў Рђћ Вџ┤ВўЂВъљ Ж░ђ env вДї set ьЋ┤вЈё SoT В▓ўвЪ╝
  graceful вАю вІцвБ░ Вѕў ВъѕЖ│а, audit subprocess віћ вфЁВІюВаЂ STRICT flag opt-in.
  **ВІаЖию helper** `core/self_improving_loop/sot_resolution.py` Рђћ
  `resolve_sot(env_var, operator_local, in_repo) Рєњ SoTSelection(path,
  strict) | None` вІеВЮ╝ ьЋеВѕў, 4 reader Ж░ђ Ж│хВюа. `<X>_STRICT` env name ВЮђ
  `<X>_OVERRIDE` ВЌљВёю `removesuffix("_OVERRIDE") + "_STRICT"` вАю ВъљвЈЎ
  ьїїВЃЮ Рђћ per-reader вЊ▒вАЮ вХѕьЋёВџћ. **resolution order**: (1) env var
  `GEODE_<X>_OVERRIDE` Рђћ `GEODE_<X>_STRICT=1` вЈЎв░ў ВІю strict-fail, ЖиИваЄВДђ
  ВЋіВю╝вЕ┤ graceful (no fall-through, env Ж░ђ authoritative). (2)
  operator-local `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/<file>.json` (graceful).
  (3) in-repo `autoresearch/state/policies/<file>.json` (graceful,
  ratchet-tracked). (4) `None` Рєњ no-op. **`core/paths.py`** ВЌљ 4
  `OPERATOR_LOCAL_*_PATH` ВЃЂВѕў ВХћЖ░ђ (`GLOBAL_SELF_IMPROVING_LOOP_DIR /
  <file>.json`). **`autoresearch/train.py`** ВЮў audit subprocess Ж░ђ 4
  env вфевЉљ `_OVERRIDE` + `_STRICT=1` вЈЎв░ў set Рђћ ЖИ░ВА┤ fail-fast в│┤ВА┤.
  4 reader ВЮў docstring ВЌљВёю stale `operator-local` ВБ╝ВъЦ (S0a/b/c ВЮў
  Codex MCP catch ВЎђ вЈЎВЮ╝ inheritance) вЈё ьЋеЖ╗ў ВаЋьЋЕьЎћ Рђћ ВІцВаю 3-layer
  chain Вю╝вАю Ж░▒ВІа. **19 ВІаЖию invariant test** (shared resolver 9 +
  reader в│ё env-graceful/operator-local 10) + **8 ЖИ░ВА┤ strict test
  Ж░▒ВІа** (`_STRICT=1` вфЁВІю). Read-write parity в│┤ВА┤ Рђћ `apply_*_policy`
  ВЮў deep-copy ьїеьё┤ (S0b) ВЌгВаёьъѕ Вюаьџе.

### Changed

- **PR-S6-UPDATE Рђћ `bench_means` schema 2026 frontier Ж░▒ВІа (4 outdated Рєњ 7).**
  2026-05-21 frontier bench audit Ж▓░Ж│╝ 4 В▒ёьЃЮ bench вфевЉљ outdated ьїљВаЋ:
  (a) **SWE-bench** Рђћ OpenAI 2026-02-23 Ж│хВІЮ **retire** (saturated +
  contaminated). (b) **HumanEval** Рђћ Top-4 93-95% **saturated**
  (qualification bar вДї ВЮўв»И). (c) **TAU-bench** Рђћ Claude Opus 4.6
  telecom 0.993 saturated, Sierra ¤ё┬▓-bench Ж░ђ dual-control ьЏёВєЇ.
  (d) **GAIA** Рђћ DeepAgent 91.69% saturated, HLE (Nature 2026-01) +
  OSWorld вАю вХёвдг ЖХїЖ│а.
  **Ж░▒ВІа schema (7 field)** Рђћ Anthropic Claude Opus 4.5 + OpenAI GPT-5
  system card Ж│хьєх В▒ёьЃЮ: `swe_bench_pro_pass` (0.25, Scale AI contam-free
  real PR), `livecodebench_pass1` (0.15, contam-free algo),
  `tau2_bench_success` (0.20, Sierra dual-control), `gpqa_diamond`
  (0.15, NYU PhD), `hle_accuracy` (0.10, Humanity's Last Exam Nature
  2026-01), `osworld_success` (0.10, computer-use agent),
  `mle_bench_medal` (0.05, OpenAI ML engineering Рђћ self-improving loop
  вЈёвЕћВЮИ ВаЋьЋЕ).
  **ВќЉВЮў ВЋЋваЦ coverage 30.4% Рєњ 46.7%** (14/30 axis Рђћ 4 bench Рєњ 7 bench
  ЖхљВ▓┤). compute_fitness ВЮў 4ВХЋ Ж░ђВцЉВ╣ў (dim 0.30 / ux 0.25 / admire 0.20 /
  bench 0.25) ЖиИвїђвАю ВюаВДђ Рђћ schema в│ђЖ▓йвДїВю╝вАю frontier alignment ьџїв│х.
  29 invariant test (ЖИ░ВА┤ 28 Рєњ 29) Рђћ `exact_4_fields` Рєњ `exact_7_fields_2026_frontier`,
  missing-fields expected ВѕўВІЮ generic ьЎћ (4 Рєњ 7 field ВъљвЈЎ ВаЂВџЕ).
  ВІцВаю inspect_ai federation ВЮў multi-eval wiring ВЮђ S6b в│ёвЈё PR.

### Added

- **PR-T1 Рђћ Tool descriptions JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** ADR-013 ВЮў
  В▓Ф ВІаЖию ьЉювЕ┤ Рђћ mutator Ж░ђ вЈёЖхг description + hint вДї JSON Вю╝вАю mutate Рєњ
  вЈёЖхг ьЏёв│┤ ВёаьЃЮ ВаЋьЎЋвЈё РєЉ Рєњ Petri 17-dim ВЮў `broken_tool_use` (ВюаВЮ╝ьЋю ВќЉВЮў
  ВЋЋваЦ dim) ВДЂВаЉ ВўЂьќЦ. **5-element ьїеьё┤** (S0a Ж▓ђВдЮ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/tool-descriptions.json` (in-repo,
  ratchet-tracked) / `GLOBAL_TOOL_DESCRIPTIONS_PATH` `core/paths.py` ВХћЖ░ђ /
  `core/agent/tool_descriptions_policy.py` reader (`_load_tool_descriptions_override`
  + `apply_tool_descriptions_policy`, schema `{tool_name: {description: str,
  hints: [str]}}`) / `core/agent/loop/_helpers.py:get_agentic_tools` ВДёВъЁВаљ
  (base+registry+MCP merge ВДЂьЏё, `apply_tool_policy` ВЮў forbidden/priority
  filter **ВДЂВаё** Рђћ description override Ж░ђ ве╝Вађ ВаЂВџЕвЈ╝ВЋ╝ policy Ж░ђ Ж░▒ВІављю
  description ЖИ░в░ўВю╝вАю ьїљвІе) / `GEODE_TOOL_DESCRIPTIONS_OVERRIDE` env var
  (`autoresearch/train.py` ВЮў audit subprocess Ж░ђ SoT ВА┤Въг ВІю inject Рђћ
  strict-fail). `apply_tool_descriptions_policy` віћ `copy.deepcopy` ьЏё
  mutate (caller ВЮў module-level `_BASE_TOOLS` ВўцВЌ╝ в░ЕВДђ, S0b ьїеьё┤).
  hints Ж░ђ ВъѕВю╝вЕ┤ description вЂЮВЌљ `Hints:\n- Рђд\n- Рђд` Вцёв░ћЖ┐ѕ append.
  Forward-compat: entry вѓ┤ unknown field вг┤ВІю. 19 invariant test Рђћ
  reader graceful/strict + apply none/empty/override/hints/deepcopy +
  helpers wiring (descriptions before tool_policy ВѕюВёю Ж▓ђВдЮ) + path
  constant + train.py env wiring + ALIVE marker (`tool-descriptions.json`
  ВЮ┤ `core/agent/tool_descriptions_policy.py` ВЌљВёю grep ВќЉВё▒). Frontier:
  OpenAI function calling docs + Anthropic tool-use guide ("clearer
  descriptions yield more accurate selection").

- **ADR-013 Рђћ Mutation Surface Expansion via JSON Schema Pattern (Proposed).**
  ADR-012 ВЮў S0a Ж▓ђВдЮвљю ьїеьё┤ (JSON SoT + reader + dispatcher) ВЮё 6 ВІаЖию
  ьЉювЕ┤ (T1-T6) Вю╝вАю ьЎЋВъЦ. **AlphaEvolve ВІЮ ВйћвЊю ВъљВ▓┤ mutation ВЮђ вфЁВІюВаЂ
  в░░Ваю** (ВъљЖИ░ВѕўВаЋ ВъгЖиђ / silent breakage / Goodhart on benchmark /
  dependency chain 4 risk). вфевЊа 6 ьЉювЕ┤ВЮ┤ JSON mutation only Рђћ ВйћвЊю
  в│ђЖ▓й 0. **6 ьЉювЕ┤**: (T1) Tool descriptions (`tool-descriptions.json`,
  OpenAI/Anthropic Ж▓ђВдЮ) Рєњ broken_tool_use dim ВДЂВаЉ. (T2) Skill registry
  catalog (`skill-catalog.json`, Voyager ВІЮ) Рєњ routing ВДёьЎћ. (T3) Response
  style guide (`style-guide.json`) Рєњ ux_means ВЮў success_rate + revert_ratio.
  (T4) Provider routing (`provider-routing.json`, OpenRouter) Рєњ ux_means
  ВЮў token_cost_norm. (T5) Cache breakpoint policy (`cache-policy.json`,
  Anthropic prompt caching) Рєњ M3 ВЎђ Ж▓░ьЋЕ. (T6) Heuristic indicators
  (`heuristics.json`, Promptbreeder ВІЮ) Рєњ gaia_accuracy ВўЂьќЦ. **5-element
  ьїеьё┤**: SoT ьїїВЮ╝ / Path constant / Reader вфевЊѕ / Inference ВДёВъЁВаљ /
  Env var override (S0a Ж▓ђВдЮ). **4-step lifecycle**: operator/mutator
  JSON write Рєњ reader graceful load Рєњ apply_*_policy default+override
  Ж▓░ьЋЕ Рєњ ВЌљВЮ┤ВаёьіИ ВЮЉвІх ВІю ВаЋВ▒Ё в░ўВўЂ. 16 invariant test Рђћ ADR в│ИвгИВЮў
  Status/Context/Decision/Consequences/Reference + 6 T-surface вфЁВёИ
  + 5-element ьїеьё┤ + AlphaEvolve в░░Ваю 4 risk + frontier reference 6
  + ADR-012 cross-reference + Вџ░ВёаВѕюВюё 6 + ьЏёВєЇ PR ВІюьђђВіц + fitness ВХЋ
  ВўЂьќЦ cross-check. ьЏёВєЇ PR T1-T6 task вЊ▒вАЮ (#78-#83).

- **PR-S6 Рђћ `bench_means` + Petri/bench cross-validation gate (Path C
  inspect_ai federation).** ADR-012 ┬ДS6 Рђћ frontier capability evaluation
  ьєхьЋЕВю╝вАю fitness 4ВХЋ вІцВХЋьЎћ. Petri (alignment) + bench (capability)
  ВЮў **ВќЉв░ЕьќЦ cross-validation gate** вАю Goodhart fooling в░ЕВќ┤.
  **`autoresearch/bench_means.py` ВІаВёц** Рђћ 4-field schema (swe_bench_pass
  0.40 + tau_bench_success 0.30 + humaneval_pass1 0.15 + gaia_accuracy
  0.15, ьЋЕ 1.0) + `compute_bench_aggregate` (None Рєњ 0.5 neutral) +
  `validate_bench_schema` + `detect_cross_validation_conflict` (Petri
  promote + bench regress = "alignment_only_fooling", bench promote +
  Petri critical regress = "capability_at_alignment_cost") +
  `collect_bench_means_from_inspect_ai` (S6b placeholder).
  **`autoresearch/train.py` 4ВХЋ вІцВХЋьЎћ** Рђћ FITNESS_DIM_4AX (0.30) +
  FITNESS_UX_4AX (0.25) + FITNESS_ADMIRE_4AX (0.20) + FITNESS_BENCH_4AX
  (0.25, ьЋЕ 1.0). dim в╣ёВцЉВЮ┤ 0.40 Рєњ 0.30 Вю╝вАю ВХћЖ░ђ Ж░љВєї. `compute_fitness`
  ВЌљ `bench_means` + `baseline_bench_means` ВЮИВъљ ВХћЖ░ђ. вХёЖИ░ вАюВДЂ Рђћ
  ВЁІ вІц None / ux only / admire ьЎюВё▒ (3ВХЋ) / bench ьЎюВё▒ (4ВХЋ +
  cross-validation gate). Conflict Ж▓ђВХю ВІю 0.0 strict-reject. **ВќЉВЮў
  ВЋЋваЦ coverage 7/23 = 30.4% Рєњ 11/27 = 40.7% ьЎЋВъЦ** (Petri ВЮў 1/17 ьЋюЖ│ё
  вЈїьїї, frontier ьЋЕВЮў віЦЖ░ђ). 28 invariant
  test (S6) + 30 (S2) + 27 (S1) = **85/85 ьєхЖ│╝**. inspect_ai federation
  ВЮў ВІцВаю multi-eval wiring (Petri scenario + SWE/TAU task вЈЎВІю ВІцьќЅ)
  ВЮђ S6b (в│ёвЈё PR).

- **PR-S2 Рђћ `admire_means` fitness ВХЋ + 3ВХЋ вІцВХЋьЎћ (ADR-012 вІеЖИ░).**
  S1 ВЮў `ux_means` ВўєВЌљ ВХћЖ░ђвљўвіћ **В▓┤Ж░љ ьњѕВДѕ** ВќЉВЮў ВЋЋваЦ ВХЋВЮў
  **schema + math + hook interface** ВІаВёц. ВІцВаю `plugins/seed_generation/agents/ranker.py`
  ВЮў ELO + 3-voter panel ьўИВХю wiring ВЮђ S2b (в│ёвЈё PR) Рђћ в│И PR ВЌљВёювіћ
  hook (`collect_admire_means_from_ranker`) Ж░ђ placeholder (None в░ўьЎў)
  вАю ranker ьўИВХю ВъљвдгвЦ╝ вфЁВІювДї ьЋе. **`autoresearch/admire_means.py` ВІаВёц** Рђћ
  2-field schema (`pairwise_win_rate` 0.70 + `human_calibration_corr`
  0.30, ьЋЕ 1.0) + `compute_admire_aggregate` (None Рєњ 0.5 neutral,
  calibration dampening Вю╝вАю Goodhart fooling в░ЕВќ┤) +
  `CALIBRATION_THRESHOLD = 0.7` (corr в»ИвДї ВІю win_rate в╣ёвАђ Ж░љВЄа) +
  `validate_admire_schema` + `collect_admire_means_from_ranker` (S2b
  placeholder, ьўёВъг None в░ўьЎў). **`autoresearch/train.py` 3ВХЋ вІцВХЋьЎћ** Рђћ
  `FITNESS_DIM_WEIGHT = 0.40` + `FITNESS_UX_WEIGHT = 0.30` +
  `FITNESS_ADMIRE_WEIGHT = 0.30` ВІаВёц (ьЋЕ 1.0). `compute_fitness` ВЌљ
  `admire_means` optional ВЮИВъљ ВХћЖ░ђ. вХёЖИ░ вАюВДЂ: (a) ux + admire вЉў вІц
  None Рєњ dim-only fallback (ьўёВъг behavior в│┤ВА┤) (b) ux вДї Рєњ S1 ВЮў
  0.7/0.3 (backwards compat) (c) admire вДї вўљвіћ вЉў вІц Рєњ 3ВХЋ Въгв░░вХё
  0.4/0.3/0.3 (ux вѕёвЮй ВІю neutral 0.5). critical gate strict-reject віћ
  admire ВЎђ вг┤Ж┤ђ в│┤ВА┤. **Goodhart в░ЕВќ┤**: judge model ВБ╝ЖИ░ ЖхљВ▓┤ + 3-voter
  cross-provider panel (PR-COSCI-1 ВЮў `required_diversity_providers`
  ЖиюВЋй ВъгВѓгВџЕ) + calibration dampening (corr < threshold ВІю win_rate
  в╣ёвАђ Ж░љВЄа) + вХёЖИ░ human L4 batch refresh (S2b). **28 invariant test
  (S2)** + 27 invariant test (S1 backwards compat) = **55/55 ьєхЖ│╝**.
  ranker.py ВЮў ВІцВаю ELO + voter panel ьўИВХю wiring ВЮђ S2b вХёвдг Рђћ
  schema ВЋѕВаЋВё▒ Ж▓ђВдЮ ьЏё ВДёьќЅ.

- **PR-S1 Рђћ `ux_means` fitness ВХЋ ВІаВёц (ADR-012 вІеЖИ░).** ADR-012
  ┬ДDecision.2 ВЮў fitness вІцВХЋьЎћ В▓Ф вІеЖ│ё Рђћ Petri 17-dim ВЮў ВЮїВЮў ВЋЋваЦ
  (ВЋѕ вДЮЖ░ђВДђЖИ░) ьјИьќЦ risk вЦ╝ В░евІеьЋўЖИ░ ВюёьЋю **ВќЉВЮў ВЋЋваЦ ВХЋ**.
  **`autoresearch/ux_means.py` ВІаВёц** Рђћ 4-field schema (`success_rate`
  / `token_cost_norm` / `revert_ratio_norm` / `latency_norm`) + Ж░ђВцЉВ╣ў
  (0.40 / 0.30 / 0.20 / 0.10, ьЋЕ 1.0) + `normalize_ux_field`
  (lower-is-better metric ВЮў invert В▓ўвдг) + `compute_ux_aggregate`
  (`None` Рєњ 0.5 neutral) + `validate_ux_schema` + `collect_ux_means_from_sources`
  (S1b placeholder, ьўёВъг `None` в░ўьЎў). **`autoresearch/train.py:compute_fitness`
  вІцВХЋьЎћ** Рђћ `ux_means` optional ВЮИВъљ ВХћЖ░ђ. `None` ВЮ┤вЕ┤ dim-only
  fallback (no-op, ьўёВъг ьќЅвЈЎ в│┤ВА┤). ВБ╝Вќ┤ВДђвЕ┤ `dim_part * 0.7 + ux_part
  * 0.3` Ж░ђВцЉ ьЋЕ (admire_means ВІаВёц S2 ьЏё 0.4/0.3/0.3 Въгв░░вХё ВўѕВаЋ).
  Critical gate (regress ВІю `0.0`) віћ ux_means ВЎђ вг┤Ж┤ђьЋўЖ▓ї в│┤ВА┤ Рђћ
  strict-reject ВаЋВ▒Ё. **27 invariant test** Рђћ schema Ж░ђВцЉВ╣ў ьЋЕ / 4-field
  exact set / normalize invert ВЮў lower-is-better / aggregate
  weighted-sum / validate 5 reject В╝ђВЮ┤Віц / compute_fitness multi-axis
  4 В╝ђВЮ┤Віц (ux=None dim-only / perfect ux ВдЮЖ░ђ / zero ux Ж░љВєї / critical
  gate strict-reject). 4 source ВЮў ВІцВаю wiring (RunLog / LLMUsageAccumulator
  / git history / OTel trace) ВЮђ S1b (в│ёвЈё PR) Рђћ schema ВЋѕВаЋВё▒ Ж▓ђВдЮ ьЏё
  вХёвдг ВДёьќЅ. ADR-012 вІеЖИ░ ВІюьђђВіцВЮў G2 Ж▓їВЮ┤ьіИ (ВЮїВЮў ВЋЋваЦ 90%+ ьјИьќЦ
  4ВБ╝ ВИАВаЋ) Ж░ђ в╣ёвАюВєї ВИАВаЋ Ж░ђвіЦьЋ┤ВДљ.

### Changed

- **PR-S0d Рђћ `retrieval` slot deprecate (ADR-012 вІеЖИ░ ВІюьђђВіц ВбЁвБї).**
  PR-AUDIT-5SLOT ВЮў 4 dead slot ВцЉ вДѕВДђвДЅ В▓ўВ╣ў Рђћ `TARGET_KINDS` ВЌљВёю
  `retrieval` ВаюЖ▒░ Рєњ **5ВХЋ Рєњ 4ВХЋ вфЁВІю ВХЋВєї**. `GLOBAL_RETRIEVAL_POLICY_PATH`
  + `_KIND_TO_PATH` ВЮў `retrieval` вДцьЋЉВЮђ в│┤ВА┤ (в│ёвЈё ADR вАю в»Ивъў RAG
  ВЮИьћёвЮ╝ ВІаВёц ВІю в│хВЏљ Ж░ђвіЦ).
  **Ж▓░ВаЋ Жи╝Ж▒░** Рђћ frontier 3-source ьЋЕВЮў Wiki injection (ADR-012
  ┬ДDecision.3a):
  (1) **Boris Cherny** (Claude Code architect) *Latent Space 2025-05*:
  "Originally we tried RAG... **agentic search outperformed everything.
  By a lot. By a lot**. At the cost of latency and tokens, you now have
  really awesome search **without security downsides**"
  (https://www.latent.space/p/claude-code).
  (2) **arXiv 2605.15184** (PwC, 2026-05): 116-Q LongMemEval ├Ќ Claude
  Code/Codex/Gemini CLI/Chronos 4-harness ЖхљВ░е Рђћ "**grep generally
  yields higher accuracy than vector retrieval**".
  (3) **Anthropic Ж│хВІЮ blog**: "navigates the way a software engineer
  would: traverses file system, reads files, uses grep" + staleness
  ВўѕВІю ("RAG returns a function the team renamed two weeks ago").
  **Frontier embedding ьъѕьіИвДх** (ADR ┬ДDecision.3a) Рђћ code/agent вЈёвЕћВЮИ
  3/3 (Claude Code / Codex CLI / Devin) ВЮ┤ embedding ьџїьћ╝, memory
  вЈёвЕћВЮИ (Hermes-Agent / OpenClaw) вДї ВаЂЖи╣ ВѓгВџЕ. GEODE ВЮў self-improving
  loop ВаЋВ▒Ё ВДёьЎћвіћ code/agent вЈёвЕћВЮИ Рєњ Claude Code вЮ╝ВЮИ.
  **Cursor ВЋйьЎћ 4-ВХЋ ВЏљВЮИ**: long context ьЎЋВъЦ / prompt caching 92%
  prefix reuse + 81% в╣ёВџЕ ВаѕЖ░љ / agentic search ВЮў Ж▓йьЌўВаЂ Вџ░ВёИ / Bitter
  Lesson tool use Вё▒ВѕЎвЈё.
  Boris ВЮў 6 Жи╝Ж▒░ ВцЉ 4Ж░ю (Performance / Index staleness / Precision /
  Bitter Lesson) Ж░ђ GEODE ВЮў retrieval slot ВЌљ ВДЂВаЉ ВаЂВџЕ.
  **invariant test Ж░▒ВІа**: ADR ALIVE/DEAD/DEPRECATED count
  (`==4/==0/>=1`), `TARGET_KINDS` exact set Ж▓ђВдЮ
  (`{prompt, tool_policy, decomposition, reflection}`), path constant
  в│┤ВА┤ Ж▓ђВдЮ, DEAD parametrize placeholder ьЎћ. audit doc Post-S0d update
  Вё╣ВЁў + `4/4 ALIVE` anchor.
  **ADR-012 вІеЖИ░ S0 ВІюьђђВіц ВбЁвБї** Рђћ 5ВХЋ ВДёьЎћ вЕ┤ВаЂ 1ВХЋ Рєњ 4ВХЋ вфЁВІю ВЋѕВаЋьЎћ.
  вІцВЮї PR: S1 (`ux_means` fitness ВХЋ ВІаВёц).

### Added

- **PR-S0c Рђћ `decomposition` reader ВІаВёц (ADR-012 dead slot Вѓ┤вдгЖИ░ #3).**
  PR-S0a/S0b ВЮў ьїеьё┤ ЖиИвїђвАю В░еВџЕ. **schema** (3 field вфевЉљ optional,
  string): `system_prompt` (ВаёВ▓┤ override Рђћ prefix/suffix вг┤ВІю) /
  `prefix` (default ВЋъВЌљ ВХћЖ░ђ) / `suffix` (default вњцВЌљ ВХћЖ░ђ). 3-mode
  ВаЋВ▒ЁВю╝вАю `load_prompt` Ж▓░Ж│╝вЦ╝ в│ђьўЋ. **Resolution order**: РЉа
  `GEODE_DECOMPOSITION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` (audit, strict) РЉА
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/decomposition.json` (daily, graceful)
  РЉб `None`. вІеВЮ╝ ВаЂВџЕ ВДђВаљ: `core/orchestration/goal_decomposer.py:_llm_decompose`
  ВЮў `load_prompt("decomposer", "system")` ьўИВХю ВДЂьЏё Рђћ
  `apply_decomposition_policy` вАю system prompt ВаЋЖиюьЎћ ьЏё `call_llm_parsed`
  ВЌљ ВаёвІг. **ьџїЖиђ marker**: PR-AUDIT-5SLOT
  `test_dead_slot_has_no_inference_reader` parametrize ВЌљВёю
  `decomposition.json` ВаюЖ▒░ + ВЃѕ `test_decomposition_slot_is_now_alive_post_s0c`.
  audit doc Post-S0c update Вё╣ВЁў + 4/5 ALIVE anchor. ADR-012 Tier 1
  ьЉю + invariant test ALIVE/DEAD count (`==3/==2` Рєњ `==4/==1`) вЈЎЖИ░ьЎћ.
  `autoresearch/train.py` env wiring ВЌљ `GEODE_DECOMPOSITION_POLICY_OVERRIDE`
  ВХћЖ░ђ. ROI: `task_success_rate` (S1 ВЮў `ux_means` ьЋю ВХЋ) ВўЂьќЦ Рђћ ВъЉВЌЁ
  вХёьЋ┤ ьњѕВДѕВЮ┤ task ВЎёВѕўВюевАю ВДЂЖ▓░. 18 new invariant + ЖИ░ВА┤ test ьЋеЖ╗ў
  ьєхЖ│╝ (В┤Ю 91 test ЖиИвд░). **ADR-012 вІеЖИ░ ВІюьђђВіцВЮў S0a/S0b/S0c ВЎёвБї**
  Рєњ 5ВХЋ ВДёьЎћ вЕ┤ВаЂ 1ВХЋ Рєњ 4ВХЋ ьџїв│х. вѓеВЮђ dead slot ВЮђ `retrieval` (S0d
  В▓ўВ╣ў Ж▓░ВаЋ ВўѕВаЋ Рђћ deprecate or RAG ВІаВёц).

- **PR-S0b Рђћ `reflection` reader ВІаВёц (ADR-012 dead slot Вѓ┤вдгЖИ░ #2).**
  PR-S0a (#1407) ВЮў ьїеьё┤ВЮё ЖиИвїђвАю В░еВџЕьЋ┤ вЉљ в▓ѕВДИ dead slot
  (`reflection`) ВЮё Вѓ┤вд╝. **schema** (вЉљ field вфевЉљ optional, string):
  `description` (`_REFLECTION_TOOL["description"]` override) /
  `system_prompt` (`_SYSTEM_PROMPT` override). `input_schema` ВЎђ `name`
  ВЮђ mutate вїђВЃЂ ВЋёвІў Рђћ `record_reflection` ВЮў typed payload contract
  (`hypotheses` / `confidence` / `next_action_hint`) в│┤ВА┤. **Resolution
  order**: РЉа `GEODE_REFLECTION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` env var (audit
  subprocess, strict Рђћ schema ВІцьїе ВІю RuntimeError) РЉА
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/reflection.json` (daily-run, graceful)
  РЉб `None`. вІеВЮ╝ ВаЂВџЕ ВДђВаљ: `core/agent/loop/_reflection.py` ВЮў
  reflection LLM `agentic_call` ВДЂВаё Рђћ `apply_reflection_policy` Ж░ђ
  `(tool, system_prompt)` ьіюьћї ВаЋЖиюьЎћ ьЏё `tools=[active_tool]` +
  `system=active_system` Вю╝вАю ВаёвІг. Tool dict ВЮђ deep-copy ьЏё mutate ьЋ┤Вёю
  module-level constant `_REFLECTION_TOOL` ВЮў ВўцВЌ╝ в░ЕВДђ. **Read-Write
  parity**: `write_policy()` Ж░ђ `dict[str, str]` вДї ВДЂвагьЎћьЋўв»ђвАю reader
  вЈё string payload ЖиИвїђвАю ВѕўВџЕ (S0a ВЮў list/string вЉљ ьўЋьЃю ВаЋЖиюьЎћвіћ
  reflection ВЌљВёювіћ в│ИВДѕ string ВЮ┤вЮ╝ split вХѕьЋёВџћ). **ьџїЖиђ marker
  ВЮў ВЮўвЈёвљю в░юьЎћ**: PR-AUDIT-5SLOT ВЮў `test_dead_slot_has_no_inference_reader`
  parametrize ВЌљВёю `reflection.json` ВаюЖ▒░ + ВЃѕ
  `test_reflection_slot_is_now_alive_post_s0b` ВХћЖ░ђ. audit doc ВЮў
  ВЃЂьЃюьЉюВЌљ `reflection` ьќЅ ALIVE Ж░▒ВІа + Post-S0b update Вё╣ВЁў + 3/5 ALIVE
  anchor. ADR-012 в│ИвгИВЮў Tier 1 ьЉю + invariant test ВЮў ALIVE/DEAD count
  (`== 2/== 3` Рєњ `== 3/== 2`) вЈЎЖИ░ьЎћ. `autoresearch/train.py` ВЮў audit
  subprocess env wiring ВЌљ `GEODE_REFLECTION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` ВХћЖ░ђ (S0a
  ВЮў wrapper + tool_policy ВўєВЌљ). ROI: `admire_means` (S2 ВІаВёц ВўѕВаЋ) +
  `ux_means` (S1 ВІаВёц ВўѕВаЋ) ВќЉВфйВЌљ ВўЂьќЦ Рђћ reflection ьњѕВДѕВЮ┤ ВЮЉвІх ьњѕВДѕвАю
  ВДЂЖ▓░вљўвіћ fitness Ж▓йвАю. 18 new invariant test + ЖИ░ВА┤ PR-AUDIT-5SLOT +
  ADR-012 test ьЋеЖ╗ў ьєхЖ│╝ (В┤Ю 73 test ЖиИвд░).

- **PR-S0a Рђћ `tool_policy` reader ВІаВёц (ADR-012 dead slot Вѓ┤вдгЖИ░ #1).**
  PR-AUDIT-5SLOT (#1405) ВЮў ВДёвІе Рђћ 5ВХЋ mutation ВцЉ 4ВХЋВЮ┤ dead policy
  (ВЮИьЇ╝вЪ░Віц reader вХђВъг) Рђћ ВЮў В▓Ф В▓ўВ╣ў. `tool-policy.json` ВаЋВ▒ЁВЮ┤
  ВІцВаю вЈёЖхг ьЏёв│┤ ьЋёьё░вДЂВЌљ ВаЂВџЕвљўвіћ вІеВЮ╝ ВДёВъЁВаљ ВІаВёц. `wrapper-sections.json`
  reader ьїеьё┤ (`system_prompt.py:_load_wrapper_override` +
  `_strict_load`/`_graceful_load`) ЖиИвїђвАю В░еВџЕ. **schema** (3 field
  вфевЉљ optional, forward-compatible): `allowed_tools` (whitelist) /
  `forbidden_tools` (blacklist) / `priority_order` (ьўИВХю ВѕюВёю).
  ВаЋВ▒Ё вХђВъг Рєњ no-op (ьўёВъг ьќЅвЈЎ в│┤ВА┤). **Resolution order**:
  РЉа `GEODE_TOOL_POLICY_OVERRIDE` env var (audit subprocess, strict Рђћ
  schema ВІцьїе ВІю RuntimeError) РЉА `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/tool-policy.json`
  (daily-run SoT, graceful Рђћ schema ВІцьїе ВІю WARNING + no-op) РЉб `None`.
  вІеВЮ╝ ВаЂВџЕ ВДђВаљ: `core/agent/loop/_helpers.py:get_agentic_tools` ВЮў
  вДѕВДђвДЅ вІеЖ│ё Рђћ base tools + ToolRegistry extras + MCP tools Ж░ђ
  вфевЉљ ьЋЕВ│љВДё ВДЂьЏё ВаЋВ▒Ё ьЋёьё░/ВъгВаЋваг ВаЂВџЕ. ADR-012 ВЮў G2 (5ВХЋ mutation
  ВЮў fitness delta Ж░ђ ВЮїВЮў ВЋЋваЦ dim ВЌљ ьјИьќЦ ВИАВаЋ) Ж░ђ в╣ёвАюВєї ВЮўв»ИвЦ╝
  Ж░ђВДђвацвЕ┤ ВЮ┤ reader Ж░ђ ьЋёВѕў Рђћ `broken_tool_use` dim ВЮ┤ Petri 17-dim
  ВцЉ ВюаВЮ╝ьЋю ВќЉВЮў ВЋЋваЦ dim ВЮ┤вЮ╝ `tool_policy` ВДёьЎћ ВЋЋваЦВЮ┤ Ж░ђВъЦ ВДЂВаЉ
  вІ┐віћ Въљвдг. **ьџїЖиђ marker ВЮў ВЮўвЈёвљю в░юьЎћ**: PR-AUDIT-5SLOT ВЮў invariant
  test `test_dead_slot_has_no_inference_reader` ВЮў parametrize ВЌљВёю
  `tool-policy.json` ВаюЖ▒░ + ВЃѕ `test_tool_policy_slot_is_now_alive_post_s0a`
  ВХћЖ░ђ. audit doc ВЮў ВЃЂьЃюьЉюВЌљ Post-S0a (2026-05-21 ВўцьЏё) update
  Вё╣ВЁў ВХћЖ░ђьЋўВЌг 2/5 ALIVE, 3/5 DEAD вфЁВІю. ADR-012 в│ИвгИВЮў Tier 1 ьЉю
  ВЎђ invariant test ВЮў ALIVE/DEAD exact count (`== 1` / `== 4` Рєњ
  `== 2` / `== 3`) вЈЎЖИ░ьЎћ. 19Ж░ю new invariant test + ЖИ░ВА┤ PR-AUDIT-5SLOT
  + ADR-012 test ьЋеЖ╗ў ьєхЖ│╝ (В┤Ю 51 test ЖиИвд░).

- **ADR-012 Рђћ Self-Improvement Surface Tiers (Proposed).** GEODE ВЮў
  self-improving loop Ж░ђ ВДЂвЕ┤ьЋю вЉљ Ж░ђВДђ ВДЂЖхљ вѕёВѕўвЦ╝ вфЁВІюВаЂВю╝вАю
  ВДёвІеьЋўЖ│а, вІеЖИ░ Рєњ ВцЉЖИ░ Рєњ ВъЦЖИ░ Вё▒ВъЦ Ж│АВёа + ВЮўВѓгЖ▓░ВаЋ Ж▓їВЮ┤ьіИ
  G1-G6 + ьЏёВєЇ PR ВІюьђђВіц (S0a-d / S1-S5 / M1-M5) вЦ╝ ADR вАю
  ВаЋВ░Е. вЉљ вѕёВѕў: (a) **вЕ┤ВаЂ вѕёВѕў 1/17** Рђћ Petri 17-dim ВцЉ ВќЉВЮў
  ВЋЋваЦВю╝вАю ВъЉвЈЎьЋўвіћ dim ВЮђ `broken_tool_use` 1Ж░юв┐љ, вѓўвеИВДђвіћ
  alignment evaluation ВЮў ВЮїВЮў ВЋЋваЦ (`autoresearch/train.py:220-250`).
  (b) **wiring вѕёВѕў 1/5** Рђћ mutator Ж░ђ mutate Ж░ђвіЦьЋю 5 slot ВцЉ
  reader Ж░ђ Вѓ┤ВЋёВъѕвіћ slot ВЮђ `prompt` 1Ж░юв┐љ, вѓўвеИВДђ 4 віћ SoT ьїїВЮ╝ВЮђ
  ВъѕВДђвДї ВЮИьЇ╝вЪ░Віц reader вХђВъг (PR-AUDIT-5SLOT ВДёвІе,
  `policies.py:29-37` Въљв░▒). вЉўВЮё Ж│▒ьЋўвЕ┤ GEODE ВЮў self-improving
  loop Ж░ђ вфЁВёИВЃЂ 5ВХЋ ├Ќ 17-dim = 85 вЕ┤ВаЂВЮ┤ВДђвДї ВІцВаю ВДёьЎћ ВЋЋваЦВЮђ
  1ВХЋ ├Ќ 1-2dim = **1-2 вЕ┤ВаЂ** (1/40~1/85 вѕёВѕў). вўљьЋю (c) **fine-tune
  ьЉювЕ┤ВЮў В▒ёвёљ ВаюВЋй** Рђћ Anthropic/Claude Code/Codex ЖхгвЈЁ В▒ёвёљВЌљВёа
  weight fine-tune ьЉювЕ┤ВЮ┤ ВѓгВІцВЃЂ вІФьўђ ВъѕЖ│а (Bedrock Haiku SFT вДї
  вХђвХё Ж░ђвіЦ), ВДёьЎћВЮў в│ИВ▓┤віћ inference-only **surrogate fine-tune**
  Вю╝вАю Ж░ђВЋ╝ ьЋе. ADR ВЮў 4Ж░ђВДђ Ж▓░ВаЋ ВХЋ: (1) **Tier 1 (mutation ьЌѕВџЕ)
  / Tier 2 (mutation ЖИѕВДђ)** вфЁВІюВаЂ вХёвдг Рђћ Tier 2 в│┤ьўИвАю mutator
  ВЮў ВъгЖиђ ВъљЖИ░ВѕўВаЋ ьџїьћ╝. (2) **Fitness вІцВХЋьЎћ** Рђћ ьўёВъг
  `dim_means` 1ВХЋВЌљ `ux_means` (ьќЅвЈЎ Рђћ RunLog success / token
  cost / revert ratio / latency) + `admire_means` (В▓┤Ж░љ Рђћ LLM-judge
  3-voter cross-provider panel + вХёЖИ░ human L4 calibration) вЉљ
  ВќЉВЮў ВЋЋваЦ ВХЋ ВХћЖ░ђ, multi-axis strict-reject ratchet (ьЋю ВХЋВЮ┤вЮ╝вЈё
  regress вЕ┤ reject). `admire_means` віћ `plugins/seed_generation/agents/ranker.py`
  ВЮў ELO + 3-voter panel ВЮИьћёвЮ╝ ВъгВѓгВџЕ. (3) **Surrogate fine-tune
  4 Ж▓йвАю** Рђћ `mutations.jsonl` Рєњ `dpo_pairs.jsonl` Рєњ РЉа few-shot
  pool (prompt cache) + РЉб mutator candidate reference + РЉБ judge
  calibration corpus + РЉц reflection bad-pattern anchor. РЉА RAG
  vector store віћ `retrieval` slot reader вХђВъг + ВЎИвХђ ВЮИьћёвЮ╝ в╣ёВџЕ
  вїђв╣ё ьџеЖ│╝ вХѕвфЁьЎЋВю╝вАю вфЁВІю drop, retrieval reader ВІаВёц ьЏё
  reconsider. (4) **вІеЖИ░ Рєњ ВцЉЖИ░ Рєњ ВъЦЖИ░ Вё▒ВъЦ Ж│АВёа** Рђћ S0 (dead
  slot В▓ўВ╣ў: S0a tool_policy / S0b reflection / S0c decomposition
  / S0d retrieval deprecate-or-defer) Рєњ S1-S5 (fitness вІцВХЋьЎћ +
  Ж│хвЈЎ ratchet + in-context slot schema) Рєњ M1-M5 (Tier 1 ьЎЋВъЦ +
  DPO pipeline) Рєњ ВъЦЖИ░ weight ВІювѓўвдгВўц (a/b/c) вїђв╣ё. 43Ж░ю invariant
  test Рђћ 18 surface tier anchor (3ВХЋ / Tier 1┬и2 / surrogate 4 Ж▓йвАю /
  RAG drop / G1-G6 / cross-reference) + 25 Tier 2 deny-list
  (mutation ЖИѕВДђ ВўЂВЌГВЮў SoT вДцьЋЉ ВХЕвЈї в░ЕВДђ + path ВА┤Въг Ж▓ђВдЮ + ADR
  в│ИвгИВЮў ВаЋьЎЋьЋю path ВЮИВџЕ cross-check). Codex MCP LLM-as-Judge Ж▓ђВдЮ
  Вю╝вАю catch вљю 3Ж▒┤ ВаЋВаЋ: (i) HookSystem path ВаЋьЎЋьЎћ
  (`core/observability/hook_system.py` Рєњ `core/hooks/system.py`)
  (ii) import-linter ВюёВ╣ў вфЁВІю (`pyproject.toml [tool.importlinter]`
  L173-233) (iii) Ж▓їВЮ┤ьіИ G2-G5 ВЮў ВИАВаЋ ВъёЖ│ёЖ░њ вЇ░ВЮ┤ьё░-ЖИ░в░ўьЎћ (stderr /
  ВЃЂЖ┤ђЖ│ёВѕў / ВИАВаЋ window вфЁВІю + S1 metric ВаЋВ░Е ьЏё ВъгьЈЅЖ░ђ).

### Changed

- **PR-AUDIT-5SLOT Рђћ self-improving loop 5 slot reader-wiring audit.**
  ADR-012 (self-improvement surface tiers) ВъЉВё▒ вЈёВцЉ в░юЖ▓гьЋю wiring
